sharedPost.text:
Et si vous lâchiez tout pour vivre un mini spectacle de danse à BougeLabs? 

Le tiers-lieu de Ouidah accueille ''La Nostalgie'' une création chorégraphique inédite pour le compte de sa programmation culturelle du semestre1 le samedi 16 Mai 2026 APD 18H . 

C'est une idée originale de l'Association Wa Nylo Art's Culture Bénin. ''La Nostalgie'' est un spectacle alliant danse béninoise et danse contemporaine monté à BougeLabs sous la direction chorégraphique de Bignon Acakpo.

Réservez vos cartons d'invitation au 01 96 08 20 57  / 01 61 10 08 66 !

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL – LEAD ACTOR JORDAN / STAND IN / FEATURED BACKGROUND ACTOR
Between Two Lives
 A Solkem Studios Film

Hello,

I am currently casting for the lead actor, Jordan, as well as a Stand-In / Possible Featured Background Actor for the role of Jordan in my upcoming short film, Between Two Lives — a faith-based, character-driven story about identity, growth, and the struggle between two paths in life.

     ROLE DETAILS:
• Male, mid–late 20s
• Preferably African/Black, but open to all qualified actors
• Comfortable on camera
• Natural, grounded presence
• Reliable and professional on set

⚠️ Important Note:
Some scenes may involve light physical interaction and few kissing scenes.
There is NO nudity or explicit content involved.

📍 Filming Location: Aurora & Denver, Colorado
📅 Shoot Dates: 3 Full days  July 10–12, 2026
🎬 Production Type: Independent / Faith-Based Film

💰 Compensation:
Unpaid Project

Actors will receive:
• IMDb Credit
• On-screen Credit
• Demo Reel Footage

🍽 Production will provide food, drinks, and snacks on set.

📩 TO SUBMIT:
• Headshot / recent photos
• Reel or past work (if available)
• Contact information

📧 Email: [reinesolkem101@gmail.com](mailto:reinesolkem101@gmail.com)
📱 Phone: 720-572-0029

Looking for actors who are serious, reliable, and excited to help bring a meaningful story to life.

items.text:
👉 **„Auftragsk****in“ (fiktive Filmrolle)🎬 Casting Call für Kurzfilmprojekt (Hobbyfilm)**

Wie schonmal im Januar, möchte ich nochmal auf ein Projekt hinweisen, für das wir eine Laien-Darstellerin suchen.

Wir sind eine kleine kreative Gruppe und drehen demnächst einen **Kurzfilm im Bereich Krimi/Thriller** – dafür suchen wir noch eine Darstellerin für eine besondere Rolle:

 

Gesucht wird eine Frau (ca. 25–40), die Lust hat, eine **ruhige, kontrollierte, eiskalte – aber auch leicht humorvolle Figur** zu verkörpern.

**Zum Projekt:**
• Dreh an einem Wochenende
• Gage: **400 € + Reisekosten**
• Kleines, entspanntes Team (Freunde, kein Profi-Set)

**Was uns wichtig ist:**
• Zuverlässigkeit & Lust auf eine spannende Rolle
• Natürliches Auftreten
• Interesse an Film, Krimi oder Thriller
• Eigene Ideen fürs Drehbuch sind ausdrücklich willkommen 🎬

**Wichtig zur Einordnung:**
Es handelt sich **ausschließlich um eine Schauspielrolle in einem fiktiven Kurzfilmprojekt**.

Schauspielerfahrung ist **nicht notwendig** – Motivation und Interesse zählen mehr!

📩**Interesse?**
Melde dich gerne direkt per WhatsApp oder Anruf bei Manuel:
📞 0151 55604539

Wir freuen uns auf kreative Leute, die Bock haben, etwas Cooles auf die Beine zu stellen!

In meinem Profil ist die Anzeige nochmal als Bild gepostet, da stehen noch ein paar weitere Details.

topComments.text: Hatte ich oben vergessen: Drehorte, die infrage kommen, sind entweder Berlin oder die Region um Bayreuth, an einem Wochenende im August oder September (genauer Termin steht noch nicht).

items.text:
Du hast Bock in einem Musikvideo mitzuspielen? Dann lese weiter. Es geht um das neue Lied von mir - Sie rebelliert. Wir mieten uns für den Dreh eine Location - welche genau verhandeln wir noch. Aber im Raum Lüneburg (21337)

Zur Zeit stehen wir mit mehreren Agenturen/Firmen in Kontakt und der Song wird auch live auf Auftritten performt. Heißt - er wird Reichweite schlagen. 

Bei dem Dreh geht es schlicht und einfach ums Feiern 

In dem Video performe ich den Song in der Location während im Hintergrund kräftig gefeiert werden soll. 

Stehtische mit Flaschen drauf , Dekoration , passende Beleuchtung und viele Leute - wie man es aus dem Club kennt  

Dabei soll immer zwischen den Szenen der Performance und den Feiernden gewechselt werden. 

Als kleine Übersicht :

* Geschlecht : männlich/weiblich 

* ⁠Alter : zwischen 18-27 Jahren 

* ⁠Kleidung : schlicht/modern ( wie man feiern geht ) 

* ⁠Wann ? 28.06. oder 05.07.

* ⁠Wo ? Lüneburg oder näherer Umkreis - genaue Location verhandeln wir noch 

* ⁠Erfahrung ? Nicht zwingend erforderlich, wir erklären dir vorweg alles ganz genau. 

* ⁠Was sollst du machen ? Den Song in einigen Szenen mitsingen und Feiern - mehr nicht.

Deine Vorteile : 

* Alle Fotos und Videos die entstehen bekommst du für eigene Zwecke auch mit. 

* ⁠Nach dem Dreh machen wir mit jedem von euch ein kleines Fotoshooting für eure Zwecke - auf Wunsch auch Videos für Reels.

* ⁠Du nimmst einiges an Erfahrung mit und hast die Möglichkeit dich mit interessanten Leuten zu connecten ( Fotografen , einige Künstler unserer Crew und lokalen Medien) 

* ⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst ( Fotos, Videos , Getränke ) 

* ⁠Auf Wunsch markieren wir dich auf unseren Social Media Kanälen und Plattformen 

* ⁠Du bekommst während der Bearbeitung immer ein Update zu dem aktuellen Stand von dem Video - wir laden nichts einfach so irgendwo hoch  

Sei dir bitte vorher bewusst das wir entstandenes Material weiter verarbeiten und das fertige Video auf einigen Social Media Kanälen sowie auf YouTube veröffentlicht und kräftig beworben wird. 

Also wenn du Bock hast was zu bewegen melde dich privat bei mir. 

Genaueres besprechen wir privat.

* optional : Für die Vereinfachung der Planung besteht die Möglichkeit unserer WhatsApp Gruppe beizutreten. 

Reden kann jeder - wir machen! 

Wir freuen uns auf coole Leute :)

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'ÜBERSICHT: ALTER ZWISCHEN 18-27 JAHRE GESCHLECHT: MÄNNLICH/WEIBLICH WANN FINDET DER DREH STATT? AM 28.06 ODER 5.7 WO FINDET DER DREH STATT? LÜNEBURG ODER NÄHERER UMKREIS LOCATION KLÄRT SICH NOCH KLEIDUNGSSTIL SCHLICHT/MODERN /MODERN WIE MAN EBEN FEIERN GEHT ERFAHRUNG :NICHT ERFORDERLICH WIR GEHEN ALLES IN RUHE MIT DIR DURCH UND ERKLÄREN DIR ALLES AS MUSST DU MACHEN? FEIERN!'

topComments.text: 🤣"⁠Der Abend ist für dich komplett umsonst". Der Witz in Spraydosen. Zahlt die Leute!

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

items.text:
CASTING 📸 do reklamy słodyczy szukamy: kobiet i mężczyzn w wieku 18-40 lat. Łącznie mamy 7 ról głównych (role z tekstem). Fajny, komediowy scenariusz 😉 

Mile widziane wszelkie typy urody, sylwetki oraz różne fryzury, RÓŻNE KOLORY włosów ,  zarosty, wąsy… itp. 

💵 Wynagrodzenie 5000 zł. 
🎥 Zdjęcia: 26.05.2026, w Warszawie; zapewniamy zwrot kosztów podróży;  

‼️ZGŁOSZENIE: 

📧 wyślij w mailu na FILM@FILMTROJMIASTO.PL - z tytułem ,,REKLAMA SŁODYCZE” - podaj: 

🔸 imię nazwisko, wiek, miasto zamieszkania 
🔹 numer telefonu 
🔸 krótko opisz swoje doświadczenie reklamowe, filmowe, aktorskie, teatralne itp.
🔹 w załączniku jedno aktualne zdjęcie całej sylwetki z widoczną twarzą i aktualną fryzurą

‼️ Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy do wtorku, 5 maja. 

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami mailowo - wyślemy szczegóły oraz informacje co należy wysłać w ramach selftape (będzie to między innymi: video wizytówka + scenka).

sharedPost.text:
Next Level Acting...Next Level You
MEISNER INTENSIVE FOR ACTORS♥️

Three days. One technique. No limits.

The Meisner Technique is one of the most powerful acting methods in the world — and this June, we’re bringing it to Central London.

Meisner Foundation Course

📅 8, 9 & 10 June

🕐 11am – 3pm

📍 Central London

Three days. Twelve hours. A completely new relationship with your craft.

DM us or email hello@meisnerlondon.com to secure your place.

#MeisnerTechnique #ActingLondon #LondonActors #ActingWorkshop #Meisner ActingTraining TheatreLondon

items.text:
**Rose Waite Studio** is looking for a man and his dog for a commercial. We’re specifically looking for someone with a friendliness, softness and warmth. *60s - early 70s, open to all ethnicities. *

**Fitting:** 21st May (London)

**Filming: **27th / 28th May (London)

Talent must be based in London or surrounding areas.

No previous experience needed to apply. Paid opportunity.

To apply, please email **[stories@rosewaite.com](mailto:stories@rosewaite.com)** with the subject ‘Commercial - Man and Dog’.

Please include:

Name / Location / Selfie

A picture of your dog

A few lines about you both

items.text:
🎬 CASTING – LONDON (PAID)
Looking for a confident, outgoing person to be the face of a street-style interview series for TikTok.

You’ll be:

• Approaching people

• Asking fun / engaging questions

• Comfortable on camera

This is NOT traditional acting — more presenter / personality.

Details:

• 2–3 hour shoot

• £80–£100 paid

• London location

Ideal for:

• Drama students

• Aspiring presenters

• Content creators

Must have:

• Strong energy

• Natural speaking style

• Not afraid to talk to strangers

To apply:

Send a short video (30–60 secs) introducing yourself as if you're interviewing someone.

Potential for ongoing work if it’s a good fit.

sharedPost.text:
Wpadaj na casting i pokaż swoje wnętrze!🏡

Zapraszamy do udziału w castingu dla branży meblarskiej!🍀

Kogo szukamy?✨
Nie szukamy „ideału”. Zależy nam na pewnego rodzaju niedoskonałości (różne typy sylwetek, pryszcze, okulary, piegi itp)
*Kobiety i mężczyźni - wiek 30-40 lat - różne typy urody - wiarygodni w roli rodzica.
*Chłopcy i dziewczynka - wiek 6-12 lat - dla chłopców są role zarówno mówione jak i nie.
*Nastolatek - wiek 13-16 lat

🗓️Timing:
Termin wysyłania zgłoszeń: 12.05 do godz 22:00

Realizacja zdjęć: dni do potwierdzenia, konieczna dyspozycyjność w każdy z wymienionych dni 3.06.26 / 24.06.26 / 30.06.26 / 01.07.26

MATERIAŁY DO NAGRANIA:
Wizytówka po polsku : koniecznie dodaj emocje : strach, złość, zdziwienie, radość, duma + nagranie sceny

✨SCENKI DO NAGRANIA:
DZIECI i NASTOLATKOWIE - robią tylko wizytówki
PANOWIE i PANIE - scenki + wizytówki

Link do castingu⬇️
https://unagimedia.pl/pl/casting043/

**Hey guys! We are looking to build a strong cast for our upcoming Faith & Love Trilogy, feel free to submit or share with someone you may thing is interested.                                                                    CASTING: FAITH & LOVE TRILOGY (3 Feature Films)**

Atlanta, GA | May 2026 | 7-Day Shoot

25+ speaking pages. HD reel footage guaranteed.  IMDB credit guaranteed. Meals Provided.

**NON-UNION | UNPAID INDEPENDENT FILM PROJECT**

✅ IMDb Listed Credits (All Roles)

✅ Meals Provided Daily (Catered)

✅ Reel Footage + Festival Screenings

✅ No pay - reel opportunity, non employee status 

✅ Standard commercial release required

**LEADS (4 days each)**:
* • NIA (Blk Female, 30-35, poised professional) - Scene 16 sides
* • MALIK (Blk Male, 32-38, grounded leader) - Scene 88 sides  
* • TIFFANY (Blk Female, 26-30, vibrant best friend) - Scene 155 sides

**Supporting Cast**
* PASTOR JAMES HARRIS** **(Blk Male, 48–55, Authoritative Baptist pastor) **3 Days **
* MRS. CARTER (Blk Female, 55–65, Warm, wise mother figure) **1 Day**
* DEACONESS LUCILLE ( Blk Female, 50–60, Church mentor with personality and wisdom) **2 Days**
* TREVOR( Blk Male,  28–35Charming but shallow antagonist) **2 Days**
* JORDAN(Blk Male, 30–35, Quiet, grounded, genuine love interest) **1 Day**

**SUBMISSION: **

HEADSHOT + RESUME + 30-SEC SELF-TAPE (monologue + sides)

Subject: "NIA Submission - [Your Name]"

Deadline: May 15, 2026

Email: blackgoldmediaproductions@gmail.com

LOCATION: Atlanta (church/café/house interiors)

GENRE: Tyler Perry-style faith romance (clean, no profanity) African American Roles.

sharedPost.text:
Metamorphosen des Körpers

VOM STILISIERTEN KÖRPER ZUM CARTOON

Workshop für Physical & Visual Theatre mit Mina Tinaburri
Berlin – Kreuzberg · 19.–21. Juni 2026

Komik hat es eilig.

In diesem Workshop für Physical & Visual Theatre wird der Körper zum zentralen narrativen Instrument – gleichzeitig Bühne, Bild und Kamera. Bewegung erzeugt Bilder, und Bilder beginnen zu handeln.

Wir arbeiten an einem körperlichen Spiel, in dem Rhythmus, Geste und übersteigerte Mimik Figuren entstehen lassen. Inspiriert von der Sprache des Cartoons entwickeln sich Charaktere, die direkt aus körperlichen Impulsen geboren werden: reduziert, präzise und dynamisch übersteigert.

Der Rhythmus ist dabei die unsichtbare Struktur des Spiels.
Geschwindigkeit, Timing und Präzision formen eine klare Dramaturgie der Bewegung. Szenen entstehen wie in einem Live-Montageprozess: jede Aktion ruft die nächste hervor, in einer kontinuierlichen Kette von Reaktionen.

Auch Stimme und Klang werden Teil der körperlichen Arbeit. Onomatopöien, Geräusche und vokale Elemente erweitern die Bewegung und verwandeln die Szene in eine physisch-klangliche Komposition.

Filmische Prinzipien werden körperlich erfahrbar: Zoom, Replay, Slow Motion und Flashback sind keine theoretischen Konzepte, sondern konkrete Handlungen, die durch den Körper auf der Bühne entstehen.

Zielgruppe
Offen für Performer:innen, Schauspieler:innen und Tänzer:innen mit Interesse an körperlicher Arbeit, Rhythmus und physischer Komik.
Der Workshop richtet sich auch an Studierende, Künstler:innen sowie an Teilnehmer:innen ohne Vorerfahrung, die sich für Bewegung, Performance und szenische Gestaltung interessieren.

Praktische Informationen

Berlin – Kreuzberg
19.–21. Juni 2026

Fr 18:00–21:00
Sa 10:00–17:00
So 10:00–15:00

Begrenzte Plätze

Teilnahmegebühr: €195 / €145 (Sliding Scale)

items.text: Hello everyone! I'm excited to be part of this group. I've been a performer since I was a child and I am an acting and performance coach. I hold workshops in the Aurora and Parker areas. In fact I have four seats left in a 5-hour intensive that I am offering this weekend, on Saturday the 9th.  I also provide private one-on-one and onset acting coaching, wherever that takes me. I'm terrible at networking and I want to expand my professional circle in the industry. DM me for more info on the intensive.

items.text:
Actors needed for second - Fringe Festival
Date: Sep 29th - Oct 1
Time: Between 830-930pm. (Will be specified closer to time) 

Hi,
Seeking two actors who would be willing to do a segment for a couple seconds for my Fringe comedy show in September.

Role: During my show, I will be delivering a powerpoint on a TV projected from my phone/laptop. Your job would be to facetime me.

No specific script as ad libbing/improv allowed

Person 1, shirtless or in lingerie: Hey Erin, where are you?  

Screen pans to person 2, wearing a gimp/BDSM suit or similar.

Person 2: Yeah we’re all waiting.

I will promptly hang up.

Role is unpaid (or can discuss small fee), will be credited and happy to buy drinks/food for compensation.

items.text:
Hey everyone! I’m offering a **limited-time promo on professional actor headshots in Toronto** 📸

If you need updated shots for casting, this is a great chance to get **clean, natural, industry-standard headshots** that actually get you noticed. I focus on helping you bring out authentic expressions and capturing the looks casting directors want to see.

✅ Actor-focused sessions (theatrical + commercial)
✅ Posing guidance so you don’t feel awkward
✅ Fast turnaround
✅ Affordable promo pricing

Whether you’re just starting out or refreshing your portfolio, I’ll make sure you walk away with shots that feel like *you* — and help you stand out in auditions.

📍 Downtown Toronto
📩 DM me or comment “HEADSHOTS” and I’ll send details + pricing

Spots are limited — booking this week!

items.text:
Hey everyone..Za-Nah here! I’m a San Antonio,TX based actor locked in and leveling up.✨

With a background in dramatic interpretation and voiceover work (commercial + radio), I’m now focused on building my on-camera reel. I’m looking to collaborate on short films, student projects, and creative sets that need strong presence and range.

Available to travel across Texas and open to select out-of-state work in Los Angeles!

Let’s connect and make something fire 🔥🎬

Instagram: zanah.oncamera

With a background in dramatic interpretation and voiceover work (commercial + radio), I’m now focused on building my on-camera reel. I’m looking to collaborate on short films, student projects, and creative sets that need strong presence and range.

Available to travel across Texas and open to select out-of-state work in Los Angeles!

Let’s connect and make something fire 🔥🎬

Instagram: zanah.oncamera

items.text:
Hej! Szukam sales managera.

Wynajmujemy kamery, obiektywy, oświetlenie i akcesoria fotografom, 

videografom, agencjom i produkcjom. Klienci wracają do nas latami, 

bo nie sprzedajemy "transakcji" — budujemy relacje.

Szukam kogoś, kto lubi kontakt z ludźmi, rozumie kreatywną branżę 

i potrafi zamienić rozmowę w sprzedaż.

Profil: 2–4 lata doświadczenia w sprzedaży B2B/B2C, najlepiej z tłem 

w produkcji, fotografii lub eventach. Polski native/C1, gotowy/a 

na osobiste spotkania z klientami, biuro w Warszawie.

Wynagrodzenie ~10k brutto.

Jeśli kogoś takiego znasz — podeślij kontakt lub otaguj. Za skuteczne 

polecenie (po okresie próbnym) — 1000 PLN ode mnie. Dzięki!

items.text:
WROCŁAW // TRUDNE SPRAWY 
Dzień dobry, cześć!

Do serialu "Trudne Sprawy" poszukuję aktorów i aktorek do następujących ról:

❗UWAGA - proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane; widełki wiekowe są OSTATECZNE❗

🗓️ 14.05 (CZWARTEK), 15.05 (PIĄTEK), 16.05 (SOBOTA)

TYMON Kalinowski (24 -30 lat) – kierowca w firmie logistycznej.

Wygląd: Atrakcyjny, inteligentny młody człowiek. Ubiera się wygodnie, młodzieżowo, sportowo. Poznajemy go po wypadku. We wszystkich scenach w szpitalu i jego okolicach chodzi z ortezą na nodze i bandażem na głowie.

Szczegóły: Miły, trochę naiwny, podejrzliwy i nieśmiały. Powoli zakochuje się w Judycie (głównej bohaterce).

🗓️ 14.05 (CZWARTEK), 15.05 (PIĄTEK)

TOMASZ Zalewski (25 - 32 lata) – były chłopak Judyty, analityk finansowy.

Wygląd: Chudy, w okularach. Ubiera się surowo, w ciemne kolory, najczęściej w biznesowe garnitury biurowe.

Szczegóły: Fałszywy, nieszczery, dwulicowy. Ukrywa związek z Amelią przed Judytą.

❗PONIŻEJ TYLKO OSOBY Z WROCŁAWIA LUB NAJBLIŻSZEJ OKOLICY❗ 

🗓️ 15.05 (PIĄTEK)

HELENA Cieplak (60 - 70 lat) – matka Judyty.Wygląd: Odrobinę większa, uprzejma, dobroduszna, powolna, nosi okulary.

Szczegóły: Ubiera się w wygodne ubrania i nosi biżuterię. Kocha córkę, martwi się o nią i troszczy, żyje jej życiem i często udziela rad. Dobrze gotuje. Utrzymuje dom w czystości i porządku.

🗓️ 15.05 (PIĄTEK)

AMELIA (23 - 28 lat) – dziewczyna Tomasza.

Wygląd: dowolny

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA)

JADWIGA Góra (22 - 28 lat) – koleżanka Judyty.

Wygląd: Dowolny. We wszystkich scenach szpitalnych ubrana jest w specjalistyczne ubrania.

Szczegóły: Pielęgniarka w tym samym szpitalu co Judyta. Impulsywna, przyjaźni się z Judytą.

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA) 

KAMILA Głowacka (22 - 27 lat) – dziewczyna Tymona.

Wygląd: Bystra, odważna, arogancka, atrakcyjna. Krucha i chuda. Nosi mocny, prowokujący makijaż. Chodzi w nowoczesnych, młodzieżowych ubraniach.

Szczegóły: Chce rzucić Tymona i powiedzieć mu to w szpitalu zaraz po wypadku.

🗓️ 16.05 (SOBOTA) 

KONRAD Janiak (40 - 50 lat) – traumatolog i lekarz prowadzący Tymona.

Wygląd: Inteligentnie wyglądający mężczyzna w okularach. Ubrany w specjalistyczne ubrania w szpitalu.

Szczegóły: Profesjonalista w swojej dziedzinie, uważny, wrażliwy, życzliwy, dostrzega sumienność Judyty i pomaga jej znaleźć zatrudnienie.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Zwracamy koszty dojazdu do Wrocławia, a dla ról: TYMON, TOMASZ zapewniamy nocleg.

Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule

"Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1374 + IMIĘ postaci"

wraz z AKTUALNYM zdjęciem oraz wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby)

WhatsApp'em numer:

+48 798 970 883

lub na maila:

lukasz.wrzeszczynski-siuda@polotmedia.pl

❗Nie odpowiadam na wiadomości prywatne na Messengerze❗

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach i przedziale wiekowym 😊

Czekam na zgłoszenia!

items.text:
Zaczynamy produkcję nowego sezonu **Trudnych Spaw** w Polot Media co oznacza, że szukamy nowych aktorów! Proszę o uważne przeczytanie charakterystyki i wieku postaci - zgłoszenia kompletnie niezgodne z rolą nie będą rozpatrywane.

Zgłoszenia dla osób z ***CAŁEJ POLSKI:***

Gabriela Jarosz (wiek kandydatki 40-45 lat) – koleżanka Igora.

6 scen

Dni nagrań: 17-19.05

Wygląd: szczupła, zadbana, modna, zalotna, uśmiechnięta. Mówi powoli i zalotnie. Modnie się ubiera

i nosi modną fryzurę.

Szczegóły: Główna księgowa firmy budowlanej głównego bohatera. Singielka, sama wychowuje córkę. Wytrwała, przedsiębiorcza.

Płatność gotówką od razu po planie, ceny ustalane w zależności od roli. Osoby zainteresowane proszę o wysłanie wiadomości o tytule "Trudne Sprawy, odc. 1381 oraz 1383 + IMIĘ postaci" wraz z:
* **aktualnymi** zdjęciami twarzy i sylwetki,
* wiekiem,
* wzrostem i wagą,
* numerem telefonu,
* materiałami video z odcinków, w których występowałeś/aś (jeżeli grałeś/aś w przeszłości),
* wideo wizytówką (ok. 1-minutowe nagranie, w którym przedstawiamy się, mówimy o swoim doświadczeniu aktorskim, pasjach i hobby).

na maila julia.lisowiec@polotmedia.pl lub w wiadomości prywatnej na Facebooku.

Proszę o kontakt WYŁĄCZNIE osoby dyspozycyjne w podanych terminach, w podanym przedziale wiekowym.

items.title: SE HER HVAD SELFCAST KAN GØRE FOR DIG !!!

items.text:
🌟SKUESPILLERE SØGES🌟
Har du en skuespiller gemt i maven eller kender du én som vil øve sit skuespil foran kamera? Så er det lige præcis dig vi leder efter!🫵🏼
Vi er fire medievidenskabsstuderende fra Syddansk Universitet som søger skuespillere (både hovedroller samt mindre statistroller med og uden replikker) til vores eksamens-kortfilm “Den aften” med optagelser på Nordsjælland i slutningen af maj. Hvad vi søger:

🎬Hovedrolle 1: Magnus; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
🎬Hovedrolle 2: Lauge; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
(OBS: læs nedenstående casting-call, da rollerne har nogle intime scener)

🎬Birolle 1: Teresse, 22-26 (Langt lyst hår)
🎬Yderligere statister: agere gæster til en havefest (alle aldre og køn er velkomne)

PRAKTISK INFORMATION: 
📆Optagelserne finder sted på Nordsjælland i nærheden af Allerød d. 23 maj (for alle) + den 24. maj (for hovedrollerne + birollen).  (Tidsrummet af arbejdsdagen(e) varierer på baggrund af hvilken rolle(r) du ønsker at besætte).

💰
Jobbet er ulønnet, men vi sørger for forplejning på set.

LYDER DET SOM NOGET FOR DIG❓
Så skal du sende en ansøgning med:
🌟Navn
🌟Alder
🌟Hvilke(n) rolle du ønsker at ansøge til
🌟Vedhæfte et billede af dig selv (nærbillede + totalbillede) 
🌟Skuespillererfaring (ikke påkrævet men ét stort plus)
🌟Telefonnummer
🌟Hvor I landet du er bosat

Disse informationer skal sendes til vores caster & skuespiller-ansvarlige: Line Møller Ipsen på følgende mail: Linelmi12@gmail.com - Ansøgningsfrist:  d. 10 maj kl. 12.00. 

Har du yderligere spørgsmål, er du velkommen til at rette henvendelse til Line over Messenger eller via mail - så vil du blive kontaktet indenfor alm. kontortid.  

Opslaget må meget gerne deles, så vi kan finde de helt rette til at besætte rollerne til vores afsluttende eksamen.

TUSIND TAK PÅ FORHÅND 🩵
Holdet bag “Den aften”
Johan, Line, Niklas & Sara

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'Casting cai Den afien Finder sted til Lauge og Teresses forlovelsesfest pả Nordsjaelland. Lauge har nogle máneder forinden haft en seksuel erfaere med sin kammarart Magnus. Magnus har sveert ved at slippe tanken om Lauge og mere specefikt den aften. For hvordan kan han pludselig veeret forlovet og ovenikobet med en kvinde? HOVEDPERSONERNE ROLLERNE TIL MAGNUS OG LAUGE VIL HAVE INTIME SCENER HERUNDER KYS OG SCENER I LETPÄKLEDT TOJ. Hvis du onsker at vide mere, er du velkommen til at rette henvendelse til vores caster samt skuespiller ansvarlige Line Moller Ipsen. HOLDET BAG DEN AFTEN'

items.summary:
🌟SKUESPILLERE SØGES🌟
Har du en skuespiller gemt i maven eller kender du én som vil øve sit skuespil foran kamera? Så er det lige præcis dig vi leder efter!🫵🏼
Vi er fire medievidenskabsstuderende fra Syddansk Universitet som søger skuespillere (både hovedroller samt mindre statistroller med og uden replikker) til vores eksamens-kortfilm “Den aften” med optagelser på Nordsjælland i slutningen af maj. Hvad vi søger:

🎬Hovedrolle 1: Magnus; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
🎬Hovedrolle 2: Lauge; 22-26 år (Udseende underordnet)
(OBS: læs nedenstående casting-call, da rollerne har nogle intime scener)

🎬Birolle 1: Teresse, 22-26 (Langt lyst hår)
🎬Yderligere statister: agere gæster til en havefest (alle aldre og køn er velkomne)

PRAKTISK INFORMATION: 
📆Optagelserne finder sted på Nordsjælland i nærheden af Allerød d. 23 maj (for alle) + den 24. maj (for hovedrollerne + birollen).  (Tidsrummet af arbejdsdagen(e) varierer på baggrund af hvilken rolle(r) du ønsker at besætte).

💰
Jobbet er ulønnet, men vi sørger for forplejning på set.

LYDER DET SOM NOGET FOR DIG❓
Så skal du sende en ansøgning med:
🌟Navn
🌟Alder
🌟Hvilke(n) rolle du ønsker at ansøge til
🌟Vedhæfte et billede af dig selv (nærbillede + totalbillede) 
🌟Skuespillererfaring (ikke påkrævet men ét stort plus)
🌟Telefonnummer
🌟Hvor I landet du er bosat

Disse informationer skal sendes til vores caster & skuespiller-ansvarlige: Line Møller Ipsen på følgende mail: Linelmi12@gmail.com - Ansøgningsfrist:  d. 10 maj kl. 12.00. 

Har du yderligere spørgsmål, er du velkommen til at rette henvendelse til Line over Messenger eller via mail - så vil du blive kontaktet indenfor alm. kontortid.  

Opslaget må meget gerne deles, så vi kan finde de helt rette til at besætte rollerne til vores afsluttende eksamen.

TUSIND TAK PÅ FORHÅND 🩵
Holdet bag “Den aften”
Johan, Line, Niklas & Sara
items.title: 🌟SKUESPILLERE SØGES🌟

items.text:
Not every story ends under bright lights.
Some stories begin when the cameras stop rolling, when the applause fades, and when the crowd slowly walks away. Behind every face the world admires, there is a human being carrying years of silent battles, unforgettable memories, lessons learned the hard way, and moments that never made it to headlines.
“A life of stories, in the quiet after the flash.”
That line says so much. It reminds us that fame may capture attention, but it never tells the whole story. The strongest chapters are often written in private—through failures, sacrifices, heartbreak, growth, and the courage to keep moving forward even when nobody is watching.
People often celebrate the success they can see, but rarely the nights of doubt, the pressure of expectations, the loneliness of standing in a crowded room, or the strength it takes to keep showing up. Every smile has a history. Every journey has hidden pages. Every person has a chapter they have never spoken about.
Maybe the “final interview” is not about endings at all. Maybe it is about honesty. About finally speaking without performance. About sharing what mattered beyond the spotlight—what shaped the person behind the image.
And maybe that is why real stories stay with us. Not because they are perfect, but because they are true.
Before we judge anyone by what appears on the surface, it is worth remembering that every life carries untold chapters. Sometimes the quietest words hold the deepest meaning.
If you had one final interview, what story would you want people to remember about you?

🎬 OGŁOSZENIE – STATYŚCI DO NOWEGO SERIALU 🎬

Do nowego współczesnego serialu poszukujemy statystów do sceny w Tawernie

📅 Terminy zdjęć: 11 i 12 maja  
🕐 Zbiórki: około godziny 13:00  
🌗 Zdjęcia: dzienno-nocne  
📍 Lokalizacja: Rynia nad Zegrzem

💰 Stawka:  
– 340 zł za dwa dni zdjęciowe (płatne drugiego dnia)  
– 400 zł łącznie dla osób, które przyjadą samochodem i zabiorą minimum 3 osoby (płatne drugiego dnia)

🚗 Mile widziane osoby zmotoryzowane

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na maila:  
impresariat.kamedstudio@gmail.com 
Temat wiadomości: TAWERNA

Jeśli możesz być dostępny/a tylko jednego dnia, koniecznie zaznacz to w zgłoszeniu.  
(Pierwszeństwo mają osoby dyspozycyjne przez oba dni.)

📝 W zgłoszeniu prosimy zawrzeć:
– imię i nazwisko  
– numer telefonu  
– aktualne zdjęcie (twarz + sylwetka)

Zapraszamy do współpracy! 🎥

items.text:
CASTING: HOST (Social Media Presenter)
We’re looking for a charismatic female host for long-term collaboration 🙏✨

Format:

Host/presenter for:

-Instagram Stories

-Instagram channel / Reels

-Telegram channel

Responsibilities:

-Recording videos based on scripts

-Announcements

-Behind-the-scenes content

-Lifestyle content / audience interaction

Requirements:

-Female, 18–30

-Attractive appearance, well-groomed

-Confident on camera, charismatic, with lively energy

-Clear diction and a pleasant voice

Languages:

-Fluent Russian

-English (preferably without a strong accent)

On-camera experience is a plus (blogging, hosting, acting)

Collaboration format:

-Regular shoots

-Long-term contract

-Work based on content plans and scripts

If you’re interested, send me a DM 🙏

-Behind-the-scenes content

-Lifestyle content / audience interaction

Requirements:

-Female, 18–30

-Attractive appearance, well-groomed

-Confident on camera, charismatic, with lively energy

-Clear diction and a pleasant voice

Languages:

-Fluent Russian

-English (preferably without a strong accent)

On-camera experience is a plus (blogging, hosting, acting)

Collaboration format:

-Regular shoots

-Long-term contract

-Work based on content plans and scripts

If you’re interested, send me a DM 🙏

items.previewTitle:
🚨NEW EPISODE ALERT!🚨

Comin' atcha from the mean streets of St. Louis from a basement on South Broadway, this week on Episode 98 of the podcast, Grega chats with indie filmmaker Michael Marco!

In Michael's words, their convo was a no-fluff, honest talk about the work, the process, and what it actually takes to get a film out there.

They got into Blind Blood, Michael's award-winning crime thriller, which continues to travel, recently picking up Best Drama at the Tokyo Film and Screenplay Awards in Japan, the first time the film has reached that part of the world.

Based in Texas and originally from France, Michael has over 3 decades of experience in film and television. Check out the episode on YouTube at the link in our bio and add Blind Blood to your watch list!

#indiefilmmaking #supportindiefilm #indiepodcasts #filmmaker #indiefilmsuckspodcast

items.text:
🎭 HOW I WENT FROM UNKNOWN TO BOOKING A LEAD ROLE ON A NETFLIX SHOW AT 18
Hi everyone, my name is Freya Tingley.

I’m an Australian actress working across international film and television, including SERIES REGULAR roles in two Netflix series and the LEAD in six feature films. I starred in Jersey Boys directed by CLINT EASTWOOD and played Wendy Darling on the ABC hit series ONCE UPON A TIME.

I started out when I was 14 and went from having no connections to signing with one of the biggest agents in Hollywood at 17, moving to LA, and booking a series regular on a Netflix show within three months.

Some people call that luck, but what they don’t see is the years of hard work and the clear strategy behind every move I made to move me forward. 

Lately, I have been connecting with so many of you, and one thing keeps coming up again and again:

ACTORS WHO ARE FEELING STUCK AND DON’T KNOW WHAT TO DO TO MOVE FORWARD 

You train.
You get your materials together.
You are told “get an agent.”

But then…
You get an agent and nothing happens
Or you do not have one yet and don’t know how to get in the room

That frustration is exactly why I created this.

A 2 hour, 1 to 1 personalised career mentorship session over Zoom.

We cover:
• The one skill an actor must have to book work, and how to assess if you truly have it (hint: it’s not talent) 
• How to position yourself to attract the right representation
• What to focus on if you don’t have an agent, and how to actively work toward getting one
• What to do if your agent isn’t sending you auditions 
• What to do if you’re auditioning a lot but not booking (the key most actors miss)
• The materials you actually need, and what most actors get wrong
• How to expand opportunities for yourself
• Plus much more

YOU LEAVE WITH A PERSONALISED PLAN TO BRIDGE THE GAP BETWEEN WHERE YOU ARE AND WHERE YOU WANT TO GET TO, PLUS THE EXACT STRATEGY I USED TO GO FROM UNKNOWN TO WORKING ACTOR.

Also included are the specialised tools I created for actors to keep a clear track of their progress. 

If this resonates, comment ACTING below or send me a DM 🤗

items.text:
CASTING CALL
Casting is now open for the role of YOUNGER for our upcoming short film "Hoops Edge" written and directed by Kwamé Kandekore and co-directed by Jordan Aaron.

YOUNGER, is a 13 year old boy with a passion, basketball. We are looking for a young boy with a lot of energy and sensibility. 

If you play/have played basketball (or not but willing to learn more) we want to hear from you! 

We will be shooting in London in August 2026. This is an unpaid role but expenses and catering will be covered. 

Interested? Email us at onetoomanyprod@gmail.com with your name, a recent picture of you, where you are based, a brief description and if you play the sport: a short video of you throwing some hoops! 

Let’s get rolling 🏀

Thank you, 

One Too Many Productions

items.text:
NORTH LONDON and HERTFORDSHIRE AREAS
Science Boffins is currently looking for more phenomenal Science Boffins to help us to bring science to life for primary school children. We have parties, schools and events throughout the year.

You don't need a formal background in science as we teach you everything you'll need to know.

All you need is access to a car (unless London based), the ability to work some weekends/weekdays and the desire to launch rockets, concoct potions and generally share just how much fun science can be.

HOW DOES BEING A SCIENCE BOFFIN WORK?

For the right person, this could be the most fun way of making an extra income.

You'll get to enjoy inspiring and educating children, having a fantastic time and getting paid along the way. You'll travel to an event in your local area and bring science to life for primary school age children with some brilliant science experiments.

Are you a fun, enthusiastic and reliable person and able to communicate effectively and promptly to potential bookings? Then join a nationwide team of 40+ well-paid Science Boffin presenters.  We have a strong reputation, rave reviews, and the privilege of working with some globally recognised companies.

We're a friendly bunch and have a (we think!) cracking training program to help you get up to speed. If that sounds like you? You too can become one of our amazing Science Boffins and bring science alive to children.

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Annette

Science Boffins

Science Boffins

items.text:
Hiring: Production Assistant (PA) – Denver
Dates Needed: One day between June 3–7, 2026

Please note: There will also be a mandatory team meeting the day before the selected shoot date.

Responsibilities:

* Assisting on-site with production needs

* Handling unexpected situations during the event

* Setting up and arranging items/materials throughout the event

* General production support

Requirements:

* Previous PA or production experience preferred

* Must be reliable and proactive

* Having your own car is strongly preferred

Rate:

* $275/day

To Apply:

Please send your resume to

items.text:
Fancy performing in a musical at the Core Theatre in Solihull?
STAMPS (St Alphege Musical Production Society) is looking for cast members for our production of "Everybody's Talking About Jamie" - the story of a teenage drag queen. Show week is 18th-24th October 2026. 

We'd particularly like to invite people from a range of backgrounds to get involved, to reflect the ethnic mix of Jamie's community in and around a Sheffield comprehensive school.

Major roles that are up for grabs include - among others - Pritti, who is Jamie's Muslim (despite the Hindu name!) best friend, and Ray, Jamie's mum's feisty friend, also of Muslim background. There are several minor roles too, and also a chorus of cast who are not in named roles.

This is an amateur production and no prior experience is required - just the ability to hold a tune and willingness to dance!

Auditions for principal roles are on Wed 20th May and we have a general rehearsal / pre-audition workshop on Wed 13th. Rehearsals are held in Hall Green, with full-company rehearsals on Wednesday evenings and principal rehearsals on Mondays.

If you're interested then please drop a line to [stamps.chairman@gmail.com](mailto:stamps.chairman@gmail.com) for further information.

We look forward to hearing from you!

items.text:
Hi everyone!

My business partner and I have recently set up our own talent agency based in Birmingham. Our aim is to represent working class, and underrepresented talent because we believe the arts are for everyone! 

The requirements to apply are:

Aged 18+ 

Have a valid UK passport

 NO experience needed

NO credits needed

NO formal training needed.

To apply for representation please send the following to info@ninetwofivetalent.com :

A recent headshot

Showreel Acting CV 

We currently have over 20 talented, versatile and amazing actors signed to our books and we are always in the process of adding more. If you or anyone you know is wanting representation, please do not hesitate to contact us! 

We are particularly interested in hearing from: working class talent, people from ethnic minority groups and Irish talent. Your likes, shares and support is very appreciated! If you wanted to have a look at what we are all about, our website is www.ninetwofivetalent.com and our instagram is ninetwofivetalentFOR THE WORKING CLASS, BY THE WORKING CLASS 💙

Bei Interesse schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, eurer Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, Körpergröße, Kopfumfang, (ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo ist von Vorteil) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger. 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
+++Schauspieler*innen für u. a. Studiodreh (Studio Hamburg) gesucht+++

Guten Abend in die Runde,

für die Produktion neuer Showreelszenen suchen wir, Engelspost Films, interessierte Schauspieler*innen, die neue Szenen für Ihr Material benötigen. Wir drehen qualitativ hochwertige Filmszenen - mit dem Ziel, neue Besetzungsanreize für Casting Directors zu schaffen und die Besetzungschancen der Schauspieler*innen dadurch zu erhöhen.

Als bundesweit einzige Showreelproduktion haben wir die Möglichkeit, an einem echten Filmset zu drehen. Auf dem Studio Hamburg-Gelände (Hamburg) dürfen wir exklusiv in den Studios der erfolgreichen ZDF-Serie "Notruf Hafenkante" drehen und verschiedene Kulissen nutzen (u. a. Verhörraum, Büro der Oberkommissarin, Gefängniszelle etc.).

Wir suchen Schauspieler*innen einerseits für die Studiodrehs, andererseits grundsätzlich aber auch für normale Outdoor-Drehs.

* Die Studiodrehs kosten pro Spieler*in ca. 600-700€ (zzgl. 19% Mwst.).
* Die "normalen" Outdoor-Drehs sind von den Kosten etwas geringer bzw. hängen diese dann von mehreren Faktoren ab.
* Termine werden grundsätzlich individuell abgestimmt (Für den Studiodreh wird es eine Terminabstimmung, mit vorheriger Abfrage, mit 2-3 Paarungen geben, da wir -wegen der Mietkosten- für den Studiotag mindestens 2-3 Buchungen benötigen).

Hier ein kleiner Überblick unserer bisherigen Arbeiten: [https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms](https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms)

Weitere Infos, Buchung & Kontakt über folgenden Link:

[https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/](https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/)

items.text:
🎬 ŁÓDŹ | ETIUDA REŻYSERSKA – II ROK SZKOŁY FILMOWEJ
📅 23–26.06

Cześć!

Do etiudy reżyserskiej studentów II roku poszukujemy aktorów oraz osób bez doświadczenia aktorskiego do ról męskich.

Szukamy mężczyzn w wieku 18–30 lat.

Klimat projektu inspirowany jest estetyką osiedlowej młodzieży z zajawką na motocykle/crossy i surowego realizmu — zależy nam na naturalności, charakterystycznych twarzach i autentycznej energii. Mile widziane: tatuaże, blizny, ogolona głowa, „streetowy” vibe itp.

Zlecenie płatne.

🏍️ Dodatkowym atutem będzie umiejętność jazdy na motorze / crossie.

🎥 Zdjęcia odbędą się w dniach 23–26.06

📍 Łódź

Szukamy osób o energii jak na inspiracjach:

— chłopaki z osiedla

— relacje przyjacielskie / braterskie

— surowy, realistyczny klimat coming-of-age

— naturalność ponad „idealny wygląd”

W zgłoszeniu prosimy o:

— imię i nazwisko

— wiek

— miasto

— aktualne zdjęcia

— numer telefonu

— opcjonalnie: doświadczenie aktorskie / wizytówka / instagram

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na: zgłoszenia.aktorow@gmail.com

W razie pytań zapraszamy priv 🙌

KRAKÓW • NON-PROFIT • EKIPA • 22-24.05.2026

Do filmu produkowanego w ramach programu “Wsparcia Filmowców” Fundacji ViArt - “Eleonora” - Poszukujemy następujących członków ekipy:

• KOSTIUMOGRAFA/KI
• DŹWIĘKOWCA/CZYNI

Zdjęcia odbędą się od 22 do 24 maja 2026 roku w Krakowie. Non-profit, ale oczywiście zapewniamy ciepły posiłek i pokrywamy ewentualne koszta poniesiona na rzecz produkcji.

“Eleonora” to dramat psychologiczny, mocno inspirowany klimatami francuskiej Nowej Fali z dodatkiem sennego eksperymentalizmu 

*Logline: Mężczyzna dręczony wizjami swojej byłej ukochanej stara się zbudować nową relację.*

*Luźno inspirowane krótką opowieścią E. A. Poe o tym samym tytule.*

Więcej o filmie można poczytać na naszej zrzutce: https://zrzutka.pl/fhfhuj

Zapraszam do zgłaszania się w komentarzach lub na *oliwier.zydowski@gmail.com*

OGŁOSZENIE – POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI DO ETIUDY STUDENCKIEJ
Do realizacji etiudy studenckiej Katowickiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy statystów oraz osób do małych ról epizodycznych.

📍 Miejsce zdjęć; Katowice i okolice

🗓️ Termin planu zdjęciowego: 20–25 lipca

Szukamy kobiet i mężczyzn w różnym wieku– od młodych dorosłych po osoby starsze.

W projekcie przewidziane są także krótkie role epizodyczne 

Jest to projekt non-profit jednak jest to idealna szansa na zdobycie doświadczenia i pracy w przyjaznej atmosferze

items.text: I aften lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg forhindrede også mine børn i at spise det. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød inden tilberedning. Jeg kan ikke fatte, at hun ikke gør det. Er det ikke nødvendigt? Se detaljerne i den første kommentar.

items.text:
They burned his home and called it victory.
They erased his past like it never mattered.
Families ran through the streets while the city collapsed into chaos.
And somewhere inside that fire… he lost everything.
But pain like that doesn’t disappear.
It transforms.
Now he walks through the ashes like a man reborn from destruction itself.
The flare in his hand burns brighter than the skyline behind him.
Smoke covers the battlefield while armored trucks explode across the ruined streets.
Buildings collapse around him, yet he never slows down.
Because revenge is the only thing keeping his heart alive.
Every scar across his face carries another memory of war.
Every bruise reminds him why mercy no longer exists inside him.
The people responsible for destroying his world thought they were untouchable.
They thought fear would keep everyone silent forever.
But they never expected him to survive.
Now the city whispers his name like a warning.
A warning that death is finally walking back through the streets.
His eyes burn with the rage of a man who has nothing left to lose.
And men with nothing left are always the most dangerous.
Ash falls from the sky while sparks fly through the smoke around him.
Sirens scream in the distance.
Helicopters circle above the destruction.
Still… he keeps moving forward without fear.
Not for justice.
Not for glory.
Only for revenge.
Tonight the same people who destroyed his life will finally understand what real fear feels like.
Because when a broken man stops caring about consequences…
he becomes unstoppable. 🔥🏙️

items.title: They burned his home and called it victory.

items.text:
Some stories never really end.

They pause. They wait. They stay alive in the hearts of the people who connected with them.

“Would you give me one more scene?”
That question carries more than nostalgia. It carries emotion, unfinished conversations, and all the moments that felt too important to fade away. Sometimes we walk away from a story thinking we have reached the end, only to realize later that certain characters, certain memories, and certain feelings continue to live quietly inside us.

The truth is, unfinished stories often stay with us the longest.

Maybe it is because they leave space for hope. Maybe it is because they leave us wondering what could have been. Or maybe it is because some journeys become part of our own lives. We grow with them, we learn from them, and when they stop, a part of us keeps waiting for one more chapter.

Life feels a lot like that too.

Not every goodbye gives closure. Not every chapter ends with answers. Sometimes we carry unfinished dreams, words we never said, chances we never took, and people we still remember long after the moment has passed. Yet those unfinished parts do not always mean something was lost. Sometimes they become the reason we keep moving forward. They remind us that there is still more to feel, more to understand, and more to become.

A single extra scene may not change the whole story. But sometimes it changes the way we remember it forever.

And maybe that is what makes stories powerful. They do not simply entertain us. They leave echoes. They stay with us. They become part of who we are.

If you could ask life for one more scene, one more conversation, or one more chance… what would it be?

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of one or more people, vulture and text that says 'WOULD YOU GIVE ME ONE MORE SCENE? Sometimes unfinished stories stay with people the longest.'

items.summary:
Some stories never really end.

They pause. They wait. They stay alive in the hearts of the people who connected with them.

“Would you give me one more scene?”
That question carries more than nostalgia. It carries emotion, unfinished conversations, and all the moments that felt too important to fade away. Sometimes we walk away from a story thinking we have reached the end, only to realize later that certain characters, certain memories, and certain feelings continue to live quietly inside us.

The truth is, unfinished stories often stay with us the longest.

Maybe it is because they leave space for hope. Maybe it is because they leave us wondering what could have been. Or maybe it is because some journeys become part of our own lives. We grow with them, we learn from them, and when they stop, a part of us keeps waiting for one more chapter.

Life feels a lot like that too.

Not every goodbye gives closure. Not every chapter ends with answers. Sometimes we carry unfinished dreams, words we never said, chances we never took, and people we still remember long after the moment has passed. Yet those unfinished parts do not always mean something was lost. Sometimes they become the reason we keep moving forward. They remind us that there is still more to feel, more to understand, and more to become.

A single extra scene may not change the whole story. But sometimes it changes the way we remember it forever.

And maybe that is what makes stories powerful. They do not simply entertain us. They leave echoes. They stay with us. They become part of who we are.

If you could ask life for one more scene, one more conversation, or one more chance… what would it be?

items.text: Stage2Screen Academy, in partnership with Digiquest Studios, offers a unique opportunity to master acting through a 30-day intensive course this summer, priced at Rs 18,000, significantly lower than its actual worth of Rs 1 lakh. This program is designed to tap into your acting potential and pave the way for careers in PAN INDIA FILM/TV/WEBSERIES under the mentorship of industry veterans. The comprehensive curriculum includes practical experience in stage plays, short films, music videos, indie films, and micro-drama series. Additionally, participants will benefit from a free photo shoot, professional showreel, and continuous casting support until they land a role in the industry. With an impressive 90% success rate, Stage2Screen Academy is renowned for producing employable talent in South India. Over 100 professionals have transitioned seamlessly into pan-India projects after training here. We invite aspiring actors to apply for Season 16 of our Acting & Smart Film Making Courses, limited to 15-18 participants per batch. The program runs for 30 days, Monday to Friday, from 7 am to 10 am. Register by May 12th to avail an additional 15% discount on course fees. This is an opportunity to learn from the best in the industry and get 100% placement assistance. Limited seats are available. To reserve your spot, please call 9573595137. items.text:
Statisten aller Altersgruppen für inszenierte Hochzeit gesucht

Für ein studentisches Fotoprojekt suche ich Statisten aller Altersgruppen für eine inszenierte Hochzeit im Kanton Zürich. Vorkenntnisse oder eine bestimmte berufliche Tätigkeit sind nicht erforderlich.

Das Projekt ist leider unbezahlt. Als Dankeschön biete ich euch jedoch ein professionelles Fotoshooting oder auf Wunsch auch ein kleines Video-/Content-Shooting für eure eigenen Bedürfnisse an – egal ob Portraits, Paarfotos, Bewerbungsbilder, Social Media oder etwas anderes.

Das Shooting findet im Mai/Juni statt und dauert ungefähr einen halben Tag. Für Essen und Getränke ist selbstverständlich gesorgt.

Bei Interesse freue ich mich über eine Nachricht mit ein paar Infos zu euch.

items.text:
KOMPARSEN GESUCHT für 80er Filmset , 09.05.2026 Hamburg 

(oder 16.05 als Jugendliche einer Schulklasse, Spielalter 15-22)

Hallo alle miteinander,

für meinen Bachelor Abschlussfilm suchen wir noch Komparsen um unser Bild zu füllen. 

Die Szenerie spielt in den 1980er Jahren, dafür suchen wir u.a. Militär Soldaten und Fake-Filmcrew (m/w/d) Komparsen jeden Spielalters (ab 18) 

Wir drehen am 09.05, ganztags in Hamburg Billwerder Billdeich.

Da wir eine studentische freie No-Budget-Produktion sind, können wir leider keine Vergütung oder Aufwandsentschädigung anbieten. 

Dafür haben wir ein großartiges Team mit professionellem Arbeitsklima als auch Film Produktionsstandart und für Catering sowie Verpflegung wird auch gesorgt sein!

Darüber hinaus wird der Film eine offizielle Premiere in einem Hamburger Kino feiern.

Zeit und Lust dabei zu sein?

Gerne per Mail kontaktieren: kurzfilm.schwitzen@gmail.com

Beste Grüße

Mateusz "Mati" Misiarz

items.text:
**Casting Call Tagesrolle “Chefin” für studentischen Abschlussfilm “Streng dich mal an!” In Darmstadt**

***Logline "Streng dich mal an!":***

Die Jugendfreundinnen Maya und Katrin verlieren sich: Katrin versinkt im Chaos ihres ADHS und Maya in ihrer toxischen Beziehung. Als Erwachsene begegnen sie sich erneut und es liegt nun an Katrin, die inzwischen gelernt hat, mit ihrem ADHS zu leben, Maya aus ihrer Beziehung zu helfen – insofern diese bereit ist, sich auf sie einzulassen.

***Rollenbeschreibung:***

Katrins Chefin ist Abteilungsleiterin in einem Unternehmen im Buchhandel.

Sie ist eine souveräne, etwas eigene Frau mit einer natürlichen Autorität, die sich durch die Reihen hochgekämpft hat.

Zu Katrin hat sie ein gutes Verhältnis und verlässt sich auf sie als kompetente Mitarbeiterin.

Spielalter: 35-50

Erscheinungsbild: Weiblich gelesen, PoC 

*Dreh*

* **20.05.** in Darmstadt (Bewerber*innen aus der Region bevorzugt)
* Mittags bis früher Abend
* Da es sich um ein studentisches Projekt handelt, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Verpflegung und Fahrtkosten decken wir jedoch.
* 

Bei Interesse meldet euch bitte bis zum 08.05. mit einem Link zu eurem reel unter sdma.kurzfilm@gmail.com !

items.text:
Adult Panto Jack OFF The Beanstalk  is back in the West End for 2026 thew show will   open at Scala London in the heart of London’s West End!

 

We are now casting for the following roles only

 

Jack Trott

We are looking for an actor who can play our hero  funny humble  a strong singer musical theatre/pop sound as well as a good mover with dashing looks and a great physique.

Must be comfortable  gong off script at  and working an  audience

 

 

Dame Trott - Male

We are looking for experienced Dames/character actors who are larger than life with bags of personality as well as versatility and natural comedy must be great at working an audience and have the gift of the gab

Must be comfortable  going off script  and working an  audience

 

Billy Trott  -Male

We are   looking for a  very   strong  comic to play Jacks  idle Brother

Must be comfortable  going off script and  and working an  audience .

 

 

The Dates

Auditions in May in central London

Rehearsals-Monday 30th November -11th December

Playing dates 14th December -3rd  January 2027

We are offering an attractive buy-out fee to include rehearsals and shows .

Please email details/reels  to [info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk](mailto:info@theentertainmentproviders.co.uk)

items.text: Hi! I'm looking for a DP for a feature film that will shoot mid-July until mid-August in San Francisco. I'm still ironing out the budget, but pay will likely fall around $400/day depending on skill and experience. Might have room for a kit fee. Please DM me with your resume and contact if interested!

topComments.text:
A professional DP is starting $1200/10 to $6500/10. So when you are hiring a DP at $400/10 it is likely a beginner or someone inbetween gigs and intermediate. So if you are expecting camera gear and lighting and extras, please don't unless you have gear rates too. 
Gear rates: basic camera: $400 to $2000 a day. 
Lighting: $1000 per day for basic lighting, a 1 ton van or equivalent with maybe some lights. Best.

items.text:
Male Model/actor needed 4/21 for Music Video
Male model / actor would only be needed for about 2-3 hours in the TV scene where he would be holding a camcorder filming the artist and interacting with her, then also sitting on a chair watching the footage. We would need some photos of him prior to the shoot date to hang up all over the office for the detective / stalker scene as well.

The video will be cinematic, film-aesthetic and story-driven, centered around one group dance scene and two performance-based setups. This is unpaid, but copy, and full credit will be provided, and it’s intended to be a strong portfolio piece for everyone involved. 

Age - 25 - 35

Height - over 6ft

If interested please email photos and height to lealouisa1@gmail.com or DM on IG @lea.louisa

items.text:
Hi all,

Our production company (Original Flavour) is now doing showreel scenes and showreel editing for actors trying to make it in the industry.

We write, direct, edit and color grade it so you can show your acting skills and range.

We made this one for the very talented Eden Vansittart who has now done two feature films with us.

To keep it simple :

150 per scenes. You are welcome to bring a friend to play opposite you and share the price. We won't charge double.

An extra 50 if you would like us to edit your showreel with any material you might have.

If you are interested or have any questions please reach out.

items.title: Hi all,

items.text: Come see Jerry's Girls at No Square Theatre in Laguna Beach!

sharedPost.text:
Don't miss the wonderful world of Jerry's Girls! Comme join us for a fun night out where you'll be sure to be laughing and humming along to some of the greatest golden age musical theatre numbers! 

Tickets available at: https://www.tix.com/ticket-sales/nosquare/1804

In this dynamic musical revue, three Divas and three singing and dancing women celebrate the music of Jerry Herman, highlighting the broad spectrum of thrilling material he wrote specifically for female performers. This Broadway hit features all the best songs for women from such immortal musicals as Mame, Hello Dolly!, Milk and Honey, Mack and Mabel, A Day in Hollywood/A Night in the Ukraine, and La Cage Aux Folles.

It affectionately celebrates his special gift for writing songs that capture the true spirit of the American musical theatre. The all-female cast will remind us of how Jerry Herman has given voice to some of the most iconic roles, ballads and show-stoppers ever written for Broadway. A winner of the Tony, Grammy, Olivier, and Drama Desk Awards, Jerry Herman is the master tunesmith of our time.

items.text:
Hi Everyone! My name is Nick, and I am a former actor now pursuing a doctorate in clinical psychology. I am conducting a research study titled “Trauma in Training: The Psychological Consequences of Abusive Practices in Acting Programs,” which examines the impact of abusive practices on actors’ mental health during their training. I am currently seeking participants for a survey. If you are interested, participation in this study will involve completing a demographic questionnaire and three brief mental health measures. You will also have the option to provide additional details about your experiences if you wish to share them. Completion of the survey and questionnaires should take approximately 20 minutes.

**Even though it focuses on actors, I am also looking for non-actors to participate. **

To participate in this study, you must be at least 18 years of age, reside in the United States, be able to provide informed consent, and be able to read and understand English. All survey responses will be anonymous. Participation is voluntary and can be discontinued at any time and for any reason without consequences.

Additionally, it would be very helpful if you could share this survey with others. The more responses I get, the better!

**What are the risks of participating?**

Participants who have experienced physical, emotional, and/or sexual abuse may experience psychological discomfort and/or distress in the process of answering questions related to past experiences.

**What are the benefits of the study?**

There is no direct benefit to participating in this study. However, you will nonetheless contribute to existing research on the psychological issues facing actors, particularly during their training. This may be useful in developing more effective training methods and mental health resources for individuals working and training in the performing arts.

If you have any questions about this, feel free to DM me. Thanks in advance for your time!

items.text:
TEATRO da TERRA estreia LOVE de Ana Lázaro 

7 a 16 MAIO 
Quinta a sábado às 21h30

Auditório Municipal do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 

Bilheteira do Fórum Cultural do Seixal 
Biblioteca Municipal 
Online em BOL.PT
https://www.bol.pt/Comprar/Bilhetes/176809-love_de_ana_lazaro-aud_m_forum_c_seixal/

Num Mundo altamente conectado, o Amor é uma teia que ainda se revela frágil.
É impossível falar de Amor sem falar de direitos, de relações e imposições sociais. O Amor ainda é o campo onde, em tantas partes do mundo, se lutam por direitos – sobretudo os das mulheres, dos homossexuais, das pessoas trans. Sejam estes direitos concretos na legislação, sejam eles no combate a amarras de pensamento e dogmatismos vários.
As dinâmicas de híper conectividade da vida virtual - nas quais se encontram grandes benefícios mas simultaneamente perigos e assoberbamento – colocam-nos perante cenários de comparação, a insegurança; as falsas verdades e desconfiança; solidão – aos quais simultaneamente pertencem mas querem também escapar. Arquiteturas de um mundo digital – uma segunda realidade e uma segunda pele - que parece altamente acolhedor e inteiramente hostil.

com  JOANA PIALGATA, CAROLINA MOURA 
projeto TÁS NA MIRA 
coordenadora  INÊS MARCELINO
ISABELA JOÃO, ROSALBA MBANG, VANECIA RODRIGUES 

encenação, espaço cénico  MARIA JOÃO LUÍS 
vídeo  JOSÉ BUDHA
música  JAIME FILIPE 
assistência de encenação  SÍLVIA FIGUEIREDO
assistência de produção  FILIPE GOMES, CARINA R. COSTA 
direção de produção, luz  PEDRO DOMINGOS 

produção  TEATRO DA TERRA  2026
M/12

parceria
Município do Seixal

apoio 
República Portuguesa - Cultura, Juventude, Desporto
Direção-Geral das Artes

En håndfuld babykål

7 små fed hvidløg, hakket
12 små tomater (foretrækkes cherrytomater eller cherrytomater), halverede ...

items.text:
Casting Call – Vancouver Laser & Skin Care Centre
Hi everyone!

We are currently casting **one female talent** for a series of educational videos for our new website.

## **Role Needed**
* **Role:** Female talent
* **Age:** 30-50
* **Ethnicity:** Caucasian
* **Language:** Native-level English fluency
* **Preferred (not required):** Experience filming educational, corporate, or introduction-style videos

## **Project Details**
* **Deliverables: **25 videos (approx. 1 minute each)
* **Shoot Duration:** 3 - 4 hours (approx.)
* **Shoot Date:** One day between **May 6 – 15** (Exact date can be discussed)
* **Wardrobe & Makeup:** Not provided. Please wear light-colored business-casual attire.

## **Compensation**
* **$1,000 flat rate**
* **Snacks & coffee provided**

## **How to Apply**

Please email the following to **ben@vancouverlaser.com **

**Subject line:** *Website Video + [Your Name]*

**Please include:**
* Recent headshot taken within the last 6 months
* Resume
* Demo videos (if available)

**Please note: Facebook DMs will not be accepted.**

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out.
We look forward to your submissions!

Casting Call for non-speaking product video
I'm casting for a simple, non-speaking product video. Non-union.

Looking for:

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 50-68

• 2 Caucasian or ethnically ambiguous males, age 30-49

Attached are some refence photos of talent appearances that our client likes. Any male is welcome to apply as all submissions will be reviewed and forwarded to the client for final selection.

About the project:

The shoot is for a shaving cream product, meaning you will be shaving your face on camera. One of the products is a beard moisturizer, so please apply if you keep a clean shaved face OR a short beard that will not be shaved off. 

Location: TBD - within the Lower Mainland (easily accessible)

Date: TBD - sometime within the next two weeks. We will work with everyone’s schedule to find the best fit.

Pay: $120 per talent for approximately 2-3 hours. 

To Apply:

Please email runestonepics@gmail.com with:

• Your availability

• Recent photos or headshots

• Your location

Subject line: “product video casting”

items.text:
CASTING CALL — STUDENT SHORT — VANCOUVER — MAY 30–31 WEEKEND
Casting a short political satire/comedy sketch filming in Vancouver over the weekend of May 30–31.

Project: Student short / comedy sketch

Genre: Political satire / absurd comedy

Location: Vancouver, BC

Shoot Date: May 30 or 31, exact day TBD 

Time Commitment: Approx. 2 hours

Pay: Small honorarium

Roles:

DONALD TRUMP — Male, 45+

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Looking for an actor/impressionist who can do a strong Trump impression, especially the voice, rhythm, ego, posture, and comedic timing. 

Does not need to be an exact lookalike, but resemblance is a plus.

DOCTOR — Female-presenting, 25–45

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Professional, composed, polite, slightly uncomfortable. Strong deadpan comedy ability is a plus.

BODYGUARD — Male-presenting, 25–50

Pay: $30 for approx. 2 hours

Silent role. Serious, still, intimidating presence.

Please send:

Headshot or recent photoReel/performance clips, if available

Trump impression clip, if applying for the Trump role

Role you’re interested in

Availability for May 30–31

DM me or email: borovinskiymax@gmail.com 

Thanks!

Project: Student short / comedy sketch

Genre: Political satire / absurd comedy

Location: Vancouver, BC

Shoot Date: May 30 or 31, exact day TBD 

Time Commitment: Approx. 2 hours

Pay: Small honorarium

Roles:

DONALD TRUMP — Male, 45+

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Looking for an actor/impressionist who can do a strong Trump impression, especially the voice, rhythm, ego, posture, and comedic timing. 

Does not need to be an exact lookalike, but resemblance is a plus.

DOCTOR — Female-presenting, 25–45

Pay: $50 for approx. 2 hours

Professional, composed, polite, slightly uncomfortable. Strong deadpan comedy ability is a plus.

BODYGUARD — Male-presenting, 25–50

Pay: $30 for approx. 2 hours

Silent role. Serious, still, intimidating presence.

Please send:

Headshot or recent photoReel/performance clips, if available

Trump impression clip, if applying for the Trump role

Role you’re interested in

Availability for May 30–31

DM me or email: borovinskiymax@gmail.com 

Thanks!

Hey everyone not sure if this is the right place to post but I shall give it a go 🙈 I am so interested in the industry the filming the cameras the casting and recently decided to take the leap to learn more about it. Looking at courses to gain more knowledge. Is there anywhere or anyone I can go to to volunteer for on set to gain experience or watch how it all works etc I don’t want paying I just have plenty of time on my hands and passionate to learn. I have seen a couple of intern things or places that maybe good but they ask for ages 18-25 🙈 I am more mature at the age of 42 🤯🤣 thanks x
Can travel within the north west regions

topComments.text: Drop me a PM, looking for general helping hands on a new feature and can give some hands on advice and experience if I can!

sharedPost.text:
Smashed it last night in ADULT BEGINNERS! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

Why not come and join us next time? This class is for anybody, even if you haven’t danced before!! With my guidance you’ll be amazed what you can do! (Details in the comments.) 

#liverpooldance #beginnersdance #liverpoolfitness #Liverpool #starttheweek

items.text:
🎬 ETIUDA STUDENCKA (NON-PROFIT) 🎬
Szukamy aktora do roli ojca w etiudzie studenckiej realizowanej w Warszawie.

📍 Zdjęcia: Warszawa

📅 Termin: 17.05

💸 Projekt non-profit

👤 ROLA: OJCEC 

Mężczyzna ok. 60+, postawnej budowy. Twarz człowieka zmęczonego życiem, który wiele przeszedł, ale jednocześnie budzi spokój i zaufanie.

To postać bardzo opanowana emocjonalnie — ojciec, który stara się otoczyć córkę troską i bezpieczeństwem, pozostając spokojnym wobec jej ataków paniki. W jednej ze scen próbuje pocieszyć córkę po urazie, rozładowując napięcie delikatnym humorem i ciepłem. Mówi spokojnie, z troską, choć pod powierzchnią widać, jak bardzo cała sytuacja go obciąża psychicznie.

Szukamy osoby z naturalnością i ekranową charyzmą — doświadczenie aktorskie mile widziane, ale nie jest konieczne.

📩 Zgłoszenia (komentarzu lub wiadomość priv)

items.text:
🎬CASTING 🎬
Studenci SFKK w Katowicach poszukują aktora do swojej etiudy! 

🎥Jeśli chcesz zdobyć doświadczenie i brać udział w tworzeniu ciekawego projektu - zapraszamy do współpracy! 

Szymon, niepewny siebie pracownik korporacji, który czuje jakby cały świat się z niego śmiał, próbuje zmienić swoje życie naśladując Tomka - nowego pracownika będącego uosobieniem sukcesu.

❗️Projekt płatny ❗️Stawka studencka ❗️

Kogo szukamy? 

SZYMON

Wiek: ok. 25 lat 

Nieumięśniony 

Delikatna uroda 

Szymon - dwudziestopięcioletni mężczyzna pracujący w korpo. Nieumięśniony, z burzą zmierzwionych włosów. Czuje się przegrywem, ofiarą losu - niczym bohater sitcomu, z którego się wszyscy śmieją. Wciąż przydarzają mu się niezręczne lub kompromitujące sytuacje, często przybierające formę slapstickowych żartów.

Dodatkowy atut: slapstickowe wyczucie

📍Kiedy i gdzie nagrywamy? 🗓️ 

Katowice, 11-17.07.2026 

Jesteś zainteresowany?  

✉️Napisz do nas maila - szymonchlopaczekcasting@gmail.com

W załączniku wyślij swoje portfolio (koniecznie wpisz wiek i aktualne miasto zamieszkania) i opisz swoje doświadczenie.

Odezwiemy się i poprosimy o nagranie krótkiego self-tape'a. 

W razie jakichkolwiek wątpliwości, wszelkie pytania można kierować na podanego w poście maila!

items.text:
Dzień dobry! Casting do NOWEGO 21 sezonu serialu Gliniarze w Warszawie! 
Szukam jeszcze 3 rol do 22 odcinka!

2. Stanisław Korczykowski (16) – wysoki, przesadnie pewny siebie nastolatek. Długie włosy, fryzura podobna do Krysiaka (1, 2) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 22.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

4. Borek (27) – diler; postawny, groźny, mile widziane tatuaże. (13, 14, 15) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.05

Stawka: 400zł na rękę 

5. Przemysław Krysiak (37) – zajmuje się przemytem narkotyków; wzrostem pasuje do Staśka, groźny z twarzy, z dłuższymi włosami. (18A, 19, 20) 

Terminy: 1 dzień zdjęciowy 21.05

Stawka: 500zł na rękę 

—————————————————

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres e-mail:

natan.gliniarze@gmail.com

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci - można kilka, jeśli pasuje się do więcej niż jednej!!!!!

WAŻNE !!!

W treści maila proszę umieścić:
* linki do swoich materiałów video na YouTube
* aktualne zdjęcie
* wiek, wzrost, wagę
* informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu 
* oraz nr telefonu do kontaktu

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
Hi, I'm Dani, a film photographer and part of Flare, an analog photography collective for women and dissidences with presence in Chile, France and Canada. 

We run open calls, photography gatherings and collaborative editorials where different artistic practices intersect — and we're hoping to bring it all together in a photobook in the future. We're now looking to connect with people in Berlin and build something here too — so if you're into analog photography, this is your invitation 💛

This Sunday May 10th we're opening a Mother's Day call: desired motherhood, not-so-desired, imposed, dissident. All perspectives welcome — emotional, conceptual, abstract, entirely your own. Analog format only.

Form closes Sunday May 10th:
🕛 12:00 Santiago & Valdivia, Chile
🕛 12:00 Toronto, Canada 
🕕 19:00 Toulouse, France 
🕕 19:00 Berlin, Germany 

📋 English form: https://forms.gle/j2DnPfsZRfwqm8je6
📋 Español: https://forms.gle/CELnomRbLHqZ2EB26
📋 Français: https://forms.gle/4dnp2pZSfec7LDTh7 

✶

Photography: https://www.instagram.com/jopipemi

✶

https://www.instagram.com/flare.analogo/

items.text:
Hi everyone!

I'm a photographer based in Berlin and I'm planning a series of fashion shoots around the city in the next few months, and am looking for fresh, up and coming Make Up Artists, Hair Stylists and Stylists interested in joining these projects.

These are tfp shoots, which is why they're a good occasion for younger talents to join me and my fun lovely little team! :)

Just hit me up if you're interested!

Cheers

(you can find my work on lalefavre.com)

(you can find my work on lalefavre.com)

items.text:
+++Schauspieler*innen für u. a. Studiodreh (Studio Hamburg) gesucht+++

Guten Abend in die Runde,

für die Produktion neuer Showreelszenen suchen wir, Engelspost Films, interessierte Schauspieler*innen, die neue Szenen für Ihr Material benötigen. Wir drehen qualitativ hochwertige Filmszenen - mit dem Ziel, neue Besetzungsanreize für Casting Directors zu schaffen und die Besetzungschancen der Schauspieler*innen dadurch zu erhöhen.

Als bundesweit einzige Showreelproduktion haben wir die Möglichkeit, an einem echten Filmset zu drehen. Auf dem Studio Hamburg-Gelände (Hamburg) dürfen wir exklusiv in den Studios der erfolgreichen ZDF-Serie "Notruf Hafenkante" drehen und verschiedene Kulissen nutzen (u. a. Verhörraum, Büro der Oberkommissarin, Gefängniszelle etc.).

Wir suchen Schauspieler*innen einerseits für die Studiodrehs, andererseits grundsätzlich aber auch für normale Outdoor-Drehs.

* Die Studiodrehs kosten pro Spieler*in ca. 600-700€ (zzgl. 19% Mwst.).
* Die "normalen" Outdoor-Drehs sind von den Kosten etwas geringer bzw. hängen diese dann von mehreren Faktoren ab.
* Termine werden grundsätzlich individuell abgestimmt (Für den Studiodreh wird es eine Terminabstimmung, mit vorheriger Abfrage, mit 2-3 Paarungen geben, da wir -wegen der Mietkosten- für den Studiotag mindestens 2-3 Buchungen benötigen).

Hier ein kleiner Überblick unserer bisherigen Arbeiten: [https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms](https://www.youtube.com/@EngelspostFilms)

Weitere Infos, Buchung & Kontakt über folgenden Link:

[https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/](https://www.engelspost-management.com/showreelproduktion/)

Hey Leute für einen Dreh am Wochende 09.05.26 und 10.05.26 für unseren Low Budget, Fantasy, Horror Spielfilm, hätten wir noch eine Rolle mit Dialog zu vergeben, es handelt sich um einen unserer bösen Zwerge. Gedreht wird im Bayerischen Wald im Landkreis Freyung Grafenau. Bei Interesse schickt uns euere Bewerbung mit 2-3 aktuellen Bildern von euch, eurer Kleidergröße, Schuhgröße, Körpergröße, Kopfumfang, (ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo ist von Vorteil) an harlekin-filme@web.de oder direkt hier über Messenger. 

Liebe Grüße, euer Harlekin Filme Team

items.text:
Hello all! I'm producing the first chapter of a fantasy audiobook and looking to fill three major roles. We are looking for actors that would be willing to continue performing throughout the project. Because we record in a sound booth with a small crew, set days are flexible and easy to schedule around work. Pay is small for this first chapter, since it isn't dialogue-heavy, but that will change for later chapters.

Here is the project pitch deck: https://www.ameliarinehartbooks.com/

Title: The Gods Of Blood And Honey

Genre: Audiobook, fantasy

Logline: Under cover of night in a spirit-infested swamp, an assassin and a sorcerer meet over a corpse. One wants to be king, and he wants the other's help.

Roles: 

Zajeira (female 20s, Black) 

Lazhan (male 20s, Black) 

Amur (male 20s-30s, any)

Other roles will be needed as the project progresses, so even if you don't fit these three, we might need you for later chapters.

Production Company: Paper Bird Entertainment

Production Type: Audiobook

Run Time: Single chapter, approx. 20 mins

Compensation: $1 per line rounded up to the nearest $5. For details about line counts for specific roles, please reference the pitch deck linked above. Can also provide audio samples for you to use in your reels.

Union Status: Non-union

Audition Information: Auditions will be done over the phone

Shooting Schedule: Between the 18th and the 22nd, flexible to everyone's schedule.

Filming Location: Community College of Aurora, Lowry Studios voice recording booth

Project Description: This audiobook will be produced and distributed chapter by chapter, so is a long-term project with great flexibility for scheduling.

Please fill out the form below. Thank you for your time!

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc1gq6VJQ_J8LKWMKlezWeTlzYV6h9zzU9ckzJ75teh94uUzw/viewform?usp=dialog

items.text:
CASTING CALL – COLORADO FEATURE FILM
“THE MIDNIGHT AFTER PROM”

"Prom Night in the quiet town of Richwood Pines takes a deadly turn when something deep beneath the streets turns a night of teenage revelry into a blood-soaked hunt for survival"

Roles:

Jonathan Bennett (Male, 30-60)
Emily's father, stern but kind. A loving husband and proud father.  It's Prom Night, and he's worried that his daughter might be going down the wrong path.

Mindy Bennett (Female, 30-60)
Emily's mother and a loving wife. Raised her daughter like her mother raised her. Emily has always been a good kid, but tonight is Prom, and anything could happen.

EXPEDITED SCHEDULE: Shooting occurs tomorrow, Friday May 8.

🎬 What You Get:
•$20 for 2 hours
• IMDb credit
• Professional-quality footage & photography for your demo reel

📩 To Submit:
Send headshot + contact info to: midnightafterprom@gmail.com
📱 Or text: 303-829-6885 for details

sharedPost.text:
Zum Nachhören 

Die Hochblütezeit der Kinos war von 1950 bis Mitte der 1970er. Danach verschwanden immer mehr Kinos auf der niederösterreichischen Landkarte.  Unsere Moderatorin sprach mit Autor des gleichnamigen Buchs, Karl Zellhofer, über dieses Phänomen.

PS: radioYpsilon-Hörer werden den Namen wahrscheinlich schon kennen, denn Sohn und Co-Autor Martin Zellhofer ist des Öfteren an Rene Fuchs‘ langjähriger Sendung Church of Noise beteiligt.

items.text:
Ganz großes Kino für echte Sichtbarkeit 

Dass direkt unterhalb unseres gestrigen Vorstellungsvideos von Luis Sedig nun auch kino.de erscheint, zeigt genau, worum es bei Karrideo geht: Darsteller nicht nur online stellen, sondern strategisch sichtbar machen. 

Gestern haben wir Luis Sedig in unseren Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Kanälen vorgestellt. Externe Unterstützung erzeugt dabei oft mehr Glaubwürdigkeit als reine Eigenwerbung, weil der Algorithmus unabhängige Einordnung stärker wahrnimmt. 

Seit 2009 haben wir über 1500 kommerzielle Film-, Video- und Imageprojekte realisiert. Genau daraus entsteht die Relevanz, mit der wir Schützlinge, Coachies und Darstellerkollegen sichtbar, hörbar und professionell positionieren. 

Die Einblendung von kino.de ist für uns deshalb mehr als Zufall. Sie zeigt, wie wichtig kluge Platzierung, Videostrategie und externe Sichtbarkeit geworden sind. 

Auch Du kannst kostenfrei Teil davon werden. 

Schreib einfach ganz großes Kino in die Kommentare. 

Das Karrideo Team schaut hin und pusht dann auch Dich, Deine Arbeit oder Dein Profil mit zusätzlicher Aufmerksamkeit. 

Wer sichtbar werden will, braucht manchmal nur die richtige Bühne. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion mit großem Dank an Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation 

#Karrideo #LuisSedig #DarstellerPromotion #Sichtbarkeit #GanzGroßesKino
