items.text:
Guys okay so this "agent" reached out and had me come in for an interview. Off the rip it was weird, her "agency" wasn't even on the name of the building Plaza. Then she, without my consent, gave my number to a random photographer who claimed to have been working since 1987. I asked for a gallery of his or a portfolio and he gave me his INSTAGRAM?? His Instagram is Gold G716, I implore you to go have a look and ask yourself if THATS the work of someone who's been doing this for like 30+ years. He also had wildly inappropriate hashtags on a picture he took of a literal kid on his Instagram, and I will post that picture (not showing the kid obvi) for you all to see. He then tells me I need like 4 mini skirts and a mini dress for my HEADSHOTS?? Then he says he's gonna give me his address and I'm like okay forsure he's gonna give me the address to his photography studio, guys the address he gave me was his Home. Address. 

I asked to bring my brother and he got weird about it!! Then he says "this is what your agent wanted" I literally NEVER signed a contract and met this lady ONCE. So obviously I cancel on this guy because it sounds like a trafficking just waiting to happen, and then the "agent" called me around 9:15 that night and basically berates me for not knowing that going to a photographers house is "industry standard"?? And I'm not crazy, like that's not standard right? Then she says I need to me more open minded when I tell her I'm just interested in Acting. I say okay, and then she says she wants monologues. I say forsure, as I expect this, and I tell her I'm also recording a couple (comedic and dramatic) to put in my reel. She says this is NOT how it works? Huh? Her name that she gave me was Chelsea A, she was a black woman who gave kris Jenner vibes lowkey (which isn't a bad thing really) and the address of this "agency" is Beverly Hills 
9171 Willshire Blvd, CA
90210 if that sounds familiar to anyone. She then told me that photographer i use needs to "slim" me down in the photos. After I asked her about what was going on, what the name of her "agency" was (Nova is what she told me) and how she was gonna put me out for a gig when I haven't even signed a contract nor recieved an email, she sent a very poorly worded text saying she wasn't gonna move forward with me. I will be including those texts as well. Be real guys, was this a scam? The other pictures are text between me and the "photographer"

items.text:
CASTING OFF REEL!  SAG & non-union Actors are OK to submit!

Please email me your reel (must), headshot, and resume OR just your Actors Access link with all the information is fine. 

email: ngoccastingcall@gmail.com 
subject: Teresa Submission

TERESA [Blonde, Caucasian, 40s ] - A newly-widowed housewife hiding her desperation behind a polite, put-together composure — while quietly pulling the strings behind the scenes to rewrite her deceased husband's story for her own gain. A delicious role for the right actress! SUPPORTING. LA Local Hire. $175/day (10 hours max)

Date: May 9th

Location: Los Angeles
Tier: SAG Micro Budget Agreement (union & non-union actors can are qualified!)
Short name: Produced 

Project is a proof of concept for a TV series currently in development; will be screen at film festivals 

Please submit ASAP as this is a fast turnaround :) 

Thank you!!

🎬 CREW CALL: SUPPORTING CREW POSITIONS
 Atlanta, GA | May 2026 | 7-Day Shoot
 Faith & Love Trilogy (3 Feature Films)
 IMDb Credit Guaranteed | Meals Provided

NON-UNION INDEPENDENT FILM PROJECT
 No wages or employee benefits provided

✅ IMDb Listed Credits
 ✅ Meals Provided Daily (Catered)
 ✅ Reel Footage + On-Set Experience
 ✅ Multi-Film Production Credit
 ✅ Collaborative Faith-Based Production Environment

🎥 SUPPORTING CREW POSITIONS

💄 MAKEUP ARTIST (HMUA)
 • Natural, film-ready makeup across multiple skin tones
 • Maintain continuity throughout production
 • On-set touch-ups during filming days

👗 WARDROBE STYLIST
 • Maintain wardrobe continuity across scenes and films
 • Assist with styling adjustments and quick changes
 • Help support overall character visual consistency

🎬 PRODUCTION ASSISTANT (PA)
 • General on-set support and production assistance
 • Assist with runs, setup, resets, and coordination
 • Must be proactive, dependable, and fast-moving

📅 SCHEDULE
 7 Consecutive Shoot Days
 Full availability required for shoot window
 No partial availability accepted

 Stories centered around love, faith, patience, and purpose.

SUBMISSION:
 RESUME + EXPERIENCE + PORTFOLIO/INSTAGRAM (if applicable)

Ex: Subject: “[ROLE] Submission - [Your Name]”
 Deadline: May 15, 2026
 Email: faithlovetrilogy@gmail.com

items.text:
Brand new video and photo studio in Tuscaloosa Alabama! Our massive cyc wall is getting LIT. Did some tests today. Next week full thing is ready to rock. We have a few more big lights coming to finish out the back walls, and we are building a grid of 16 4 foot tube lights that will be over the center for the talent. 

We are ready to start booking this part of our studio, and we are giving pretty big discounts to get the word out. So if you have a need for a giant cyc, let me know and let’s get it going! Info@yourseedmedia.com - Seed Creative

sharedPost.text: Did some very basic light placement testing today. These are at about 50%, we are still dialing in some electrical stuff. I have actually ordered two additional “floodlights” so we can get it to edge on the wall, and we have 16 4 foot tube RGB lights that will be in a suspended grid pattern above the center of the cyc.

We’re looking for female performers (ages 16+) to join our fabulous unpaid production in Romford and bring these iconic nuns to life! ✨

Roles include:
👠 Deloris Van Cartier

🎤 Sister Mary Robert
💜 Sister Mary Patrick
🎶 Sister Mary Lazarus
🙏 Sister Mary Martin of Tours

Whether you’re an experienced performer or looking for your next exciting show, we’d love to hear from you!

🎭 Unpaid production
📅 Show week wc 30th June 2026

Please share with anyone who may be interested ❤️

📩 PM for more information and to get involved in this FABULOUS show!

items.previewDescription: Play is an essential way of learning about the world. Doing things we enjoy without a goal in mind leads us to find new information, better understand our own capabilities, and find unexpected beauty around us. Arithmetic is one example of an area we can explore through play.

items.text:
CASTING CALL

Curiosity Killed the Lover

Genre: Romantic Comedy / Psychological Drama
Format: Independent Short Film
Writer/Director: Youssef Kobach

A lonely young man gains the ability to read minds after a car accident, believing it will finally help him understand love — until the power begins destroying the natural mystery and intimacy of human connection.

Seeking grounded actors with natural chemistry, emotional depth, and strong comedic timing.

⸻

SHOOT DETAILS

* Shoot Start Date: May 19, 2026
* Location: South Carolina (Local talent encouraged)
* Compensation: Non-paid
* Copy/Credit/Footage Provided

IMPORTANT:
Submissions must be sent before May 19th.

⸻

ROLES

CONNOR

Male | Early–Late 20s | Lead

Socially awkward, introspective, and emotionally vulnerable. Connor struggles with loneliness and overthinking relationships. After developing the ability to hear people’s thoughts, his desire for connection spirals into emotional chaos.

Seeking an actor capable of balancing:

* awkward comedy,
* anxiety,
* sincerity,
* and subtle dramatic tension.

⸻

BROOKE

Female | Early–Late 20s | Supporting Lead

Confident, witty, and emotionally perceptive. Brooke initially finds Connor charming, but becomes increasingly unsettled as she realizes he somehow knows what she’s thinking.

Strong facial acting and chemistry with Connor are essential.

⸻

HANNAH

Female | Mid 20s–Early 30s | Supporting

Connor’s sarcastic but caring sister. Blunt, expressive, funny, and grounded. She acts as both comic relief and emotional contrast to Connor’s awkwardness.

Comedic timing preferred.

⸻

MICHELLE

Female | 20s | Supporting / Day Player

Connor’s ex-girlfriend. Emotionally distant and frustrated by Connor’s inability to truly understand her.

Short role with emotionally tense dialogue.

⸻

NURSE

Female | 30s–50s | Day Player

Professional, calm, and slightly confused by Connor’s bizarre post-accident behavior.

Small but memorable role.

⸻

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS

Please send:

* Headshot
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel (if available) 
* Contact information

Email submissions to:
ykobach955@gmail.com

Subject Line Format:
[ROLE NAME] – Curiosity Killed the Lover

Example:
CONNOR – Curiosity Killed the Lover

⸻

Seeking authentic performances and actors comfortable with emotionally intimate, dialogue-driven scenes.

topComments.text: Oh this would be great to be in! I’ve always wanted to read minds. I will send my submission in the morning !

Female | 30s–50s | Day Player

Professional, calm, and slightly confused by Connor’s bizarre post-accident behavior.

Small but memorable role.

⸻

SUBMISSION INSTRUCTIONS

Please send:

* Headshot
* Resume (if available)
* Demo reel (if available) 
* Contact information

Email submissions to:
ykobach955@gmail.com

Subject Line Format:
[ROLE NAME] – Curiosity Killed the Lover

Example:
CONNOR – Curiosity Killed the Lover

⸻

Seeking authentic performances and actors comfortable with emotionally intimate, dialogue-driven scenes.

items.text: Hi everyone! I am a stunt/local80 safety diver in the tv industry, and I am teaching private lessons for actors/actresses & stunt players in Los Angeles. So if you have any interest in learning how to get dive certified, or want to further your skills - feel free to send me a dm for further information. Thanks!

items.text:
Ganz großes Kino für echte Sichtbarkeit 

Dass direkt unterhalb unseres gestrigen Vorstellungsvideos von Luis Sedig nun auch kino.de erscheint, zeigt genau, worum es bei Karrideo geht: Darsteller nicht nur online stellen, sondern strategisch sichtbar machen. 

Gestern haben wir Luis Sedig in unseren Karrideo Image- und Eventfilm Kanälen vorgestellt. Externe Unterstützung erzeugt dabei oft mehr Glaubwürdigkeit als reine Eigenwerbung, weil der Algorithmus unabhängige Einordnung stärker wahrnimmt. 

Seit 2009 haben wir über 1500 kommerzielle Film-, Video- und Imageprojekte realisiert. Genau daraus entsteht die Relevanz, mit der wir Schützlinge, Coachies und Darstellerkollegen sichtbar, hörbar und professionell positionieren. 

Die Einblendung von kino.de ist für uns deshalb mehr als Zufall. Sie zeigt, wie wichtig kluge Platzierung, Videostrategie und externe Sichtbarkeit geworden sind. 

Auch Du kannst kostenfrei Teil davon werden. 

Schreib einfach ganz großes Kino in die Kommentare. 

Das Karrideo Team schaut hin und pusht dann auch Dich, Deine Arbeit oder Dein Profil mit zusätzlicher Aufmerksamkeit. 

Wer sichtbar werden will, braucht manchmal nur die richtige Bühne. 

Christian Weiße aka Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion mit großem Dank an Sandra Wötzel aka Sandras Social Media Creation, Redaktion und Moderation 

#Karrideo #LuisSedig #DarstellerPromotion #Sichtbarkeit #GanzGroßesKino

Spannend zu sehen, wie stark strategische Sichtbarkeit heute bereits reale Wahrnehmung verändert. Welche Entwicklung überrascht euch aktuell am meisten im Zusammenspiel aus Schauspiel, Reichweite und Algorithmus?

items.text:
FIRST CLASS FREE! - Thursday 14/05 7-8pm

Mondays 6.30pm - 7.30pm (First class £3)

sharedPost.text:
Always something FRESH going on in my class! Whether it’s street, a musical theatre partner number, something lyrical or a festive Christmas group dance, we like to change it up every few weeks. I do this whilst also keeping things at a steady and manageable pace. (It is a class for beginners after all!) 

#beginnersdance #Liverpool #somethingtodo #tryitchallenge #liverpoolfitness

sharedPost.text:
Lights, camera, action, three of our talented students are joining the cast of a new film! 🎬
We are incredibly proud to announce that Brooke and Eva will be joining Summer-Joules in the upcoming feature film Boo Playing Bella, as production officially begins.
Following the recent auditions and Acting for Screen workshops hosted by Majestic Talent Agency & Majestic Academy of Performing Arts, which welcomed more than 80 young performers, we are delighted that two of our students training with Majestic Academy of Performing Arts have now been cast alongside Summer-Joules who is also a student in this exciting and heartwarming production.
Brooke and Eva will play Summer-Joules’ best friends on screen, making this opportunity even more special, as the girls also share a genuine friendship in real life. Watching their natural bond and friendship come to life on screen is going to truly be wonderful to see.
We are extremely proud of all three girls and feel very fortunate to have been given the opportunity to host the casting process and workshops for such a meaningful and inspiring film.
Congratulations to Summer-Joules, Brooke, and Eva on this fantastic achievement, we cannot wait to follow their journey throughout production.

  #MajesticAcademy #PerformingArts  #TalentAgency  #ActingSchool #FYP  #Chester

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION COMMERCIAL**

Novel Productions is casting **three roles** for a 1**5-second commercial** for Applewood Auto Group.

**Shoot Location:** Langley, BC

**Shoot Date:** May 19, 2026 (3-10 hours, depending on role)

**Compensation:** $600-1000 (Including buyout)

**ROLES:**

• **Customer** — Age **35–35** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Used Car Salesman** — Age **45–55** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Applewood Sales Rep** — Age **35–55** | Gender & ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Applewood Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

Usage will be in perpetuity. Additional usage details will be provided to selected talent.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.

Here's where a good agent advises you to think first.

items.text:
I'm looking for Korean hip hop dances (K-dance) in Vancouver for a proof-of-concept pitch video.

Can be male or female, ideally the dancer is also an actor and can speak Korean (language). Dancers can be any ethnicity. Looking for great, sharp dancers (think Noze, Narae Kim, etc...) and is able to learn choreography from video.

This is to pitch a drama episodic series/webseries as a co-production with Korea.

If interested, send your photos (headshoot and full body), resume and any video you have to Ronald at castingproject604@gmail.comNOSPAM. Further details shared with shortlisted applicants.

Thank you for reading!

items.text:
W kolejnych majowych odcinkach serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) mam do rozdania następujące  role męskie:

1.Dziki (43) – dobrze zbudowany, może mieć tatuaże. Kieruje gangiem handlarzy narkotyków, który zajmuje się głównie rozprowadzaniem fentanylu. Gdy dochodzi do pobicia Grażyny i kradzieży narkotyków, postanawia sam namierzyć sprawców i odbić towar. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 600 zł netto

2.Sebastian Wroński (53) – podstarzały podrywacz. Zamożny. Przemocowiec, który robi się agresywny po alkoholu. Często zdradzał żonę. Cały czas szukał młodszych kobiet, żeby je sponsorować w zamian za seks.

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 500 zł netto

3.Zdzisław Marecki (54) – średniego wzrostu, chudawy, trochę schorowany. Drobny złodziejaszek, mieszka w ośrodku dla osób, które niedawno opuściły zakład karny.

Data: 18. maja
Stawka: 400 zł netto

4.Ernest (29) – dobrze zbudowany. Chłopak Patrycji. Bardzo chciałby wejść do półświatka. Ma nadzieję, że napad na Grażynę mu w tym pomoże.

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

5.Gruby (28) – silny, wysoki, masywny. Kolega Ernesta zwerbowany do pomocy w napadzie na Grażynę. NIEZBĘDNE PRAWO JAZDY

Daty: 18. i 19. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

6.Igor Krawczyk (43) – oficjalnie bezrobotny, ale pracuje na czarno w szemranej firmie pożyczkowej. Wpada w spiralę zbrodni, kończy na zabójstwie żony i jej kochanka. AKTOR

Daty: 20. i 23. maja
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

7.Robert Zalewczuk, ps. Maniek (27) – drobny przestępca, typ dresika-oszusta. Przy kasie, ale ubiera się bez gustu. 

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 800 zł netto za całość

8.Roman Niciak (41) – ma biznes z nielegalnymi pożyczkami. Nalana twarz alkoholika, agresywny i wulgarny.

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9.Barman (31) – barman w spelunce. 

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

8.Roman Niciak (41) – ma biznes z nielegalnymi pożyczkami. Nalana twarz alkoholika, agresywny i wulgarny.

Daty: 19. i 20. maja
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za całość

9.Barman (31) – barman w spelunce. 

Data: 19. maja
Stawka: 300 zł netto

Chętnych Panów zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe, TYLKO od osób które nie grały w Gliniarzach w 2026 roku.

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
🎙✨ **OGÓLNOPOLSKI KONKURS WOKALNY
„ODCIENIE GŁOSU”** ✨🎙

Każdy głos ma swoją barwę.
Każdy ma inny odcień.
Jaki jest Twój? 💗💜💙

Po „Głosie Pełnym Emocji”
Po „Oddechu, który niesie”
nadszedł czas na trzeci element wokalnej świadomości — **BRZMIENIE**.

W tej edycji skupiamy się na kolorze głosu —
jego cieple, głębi, świetlistości i naturalnym charakterze.
Na tym, co sprawia, że Twój głos jest rozpoznawalny i prawdziwy.

Nie szukamy jednego ideału.
Nie porównujemy barw.
Każdy głos ma swój własny odcień — i właśnie to chcemy usłyszeć.

🎵 Wybierz utwór, w którym pokażesz swoje naturalne brzmienie
🎵 Zadbaj o świadome prowadzenie dźwięku
🎵 Pozwól swojemu głosowi wybrzmieć w pełni

📅 Zgłoszenia trwają…
📍 Szczegóły i regulamin: [https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/konkursy/konkursy-wokalne/regulamin](https://www.laboratoriumdzwiekow.pl/konkursy/konkursy-wokalne/regulamin)

„Odcienie Głosu” — o barwie. O Tobie. O Twoim brzmieniu. ✨

attachments.ocrText: May be a graphic of text that says 'KAŻDY KAŻDYGŁOS GŁOS MASWOJĄBARWĘ. MA SWOJĄ BARWĘ. Jaki Takijest JakijestTwty? jest Twbj? Nie dwóch takich samych brzmień. Nie ma jednego właściwego. Jest Twoje. W Wte tej edycji naszego projektu wokalnego skupiamy się się tym, wyjątkowe- kolorze, subtelnościach iindywidualnym brzmieniu, które prawia, że e Twój głos jest niepowtarzalny. PROJEKT WOKALNY ODCIENIE GŁOSU ٥ BARWIE. o TOBIE. o GŁOSIE ZGŁOSZENIA TRWAJĄ! GŁOSPEŁEN GŁOS PEŁEN EMOCJI EDYCJA| ODDECH, KTÖRY NIESIE EDYCJA ODCIENIE GŁOSU EDYCJA I1I'

items.text:
🎬 POSZUKIWANI STATYŚCI: AMERYKAŃSKA RODZINA (ZAKWATEROWANI W JEDNYM AUCIE! 🚗)
Do studenckiego projektu krótkometrażowego poszukujemy osób, które wcielą się w rolę amerykańskiej rodziny.

Szukamy najlepiej "w pakiecie"! Bardzo zależy nam na zgłoszeniach grupowych (np. prawdziwe rodziny, pary, grupy znajomych), które mogą przyjechać na plan wspólnym transportem. Chcemy ograniczyć liczbę samochodów na planie i zadbać o ekologię naszej produkcji! 

TERMINY I LOKACJE:

📍 15.05 (ok. 1h w ciągu dnia) – Brwinów

📍 16.05 (pełny dzień) – Brwinów

📍 17.05 (pełny dzień) – Michałów k. Warszawy

Dojazd we własnym zakresie (szukamy ekip zmotoryzowanych).

KOGO SZUKAMY?

Osób w różnym wieku (rodzice, dzieci, dziadkowie) o typie urody pasującym do amerykańskich przedmieść (patrz: zdjęcia referencyjne).

Rola bez kwestii mówionych.

W ZAMIAN OFERUJEMY:

✨ Super atmosferę i spotkanie z uznaną obsadą.

✨ Materiały do portfolio.

(Projekt studencki – bez wynagrodzenia finansowego).

JAK SIĘ ZGŁOSIĆ?

Jeśli masz ekipę/rodzinę, z którą możesz przyjechać, wyślij wspólne zgłoszenie na adres:

📧 production@to-dofilms.com

W tytule: Statuści – Amerykańska Rodzina [+ liczba osób]

W treści: Imiona, wiek, numery kontaktowe oraz wspólne zdjęcie (lub zdjęcia każdego z członków ekipy).

Do zobaczenia na planie! 🎥🇺🇸

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — COMEDY CLUB AUDIENCE EXTRAS 🎤**
**for the short film: *****KEPT GOING***
**Written & Directed by **Jordan Jackson

**Ever wanted to be part of a comedy show that goes HORRIBLY wrong?**

**We’re looking for audience extras to fill out a comedy club scene for our upcoming short film *****Kept Going***** — a dark comedy/survival short made as part of a 13-film challenge series.**

**📅 FILMING DATE: MAY 17TH, 2026**

**You’ll be:**

·         **reacting to stand-up comedy**

·         **witnessing a comedian absolutely destroy his own career in real time**

·         **laughing, gasping, judging, cringing, and helping create the chaotic energy of the film**

** **

**AND:**

**1.   You WILL be seen on camera**

**2.   Includes IMDb Credit**

**3.   Great chance to network & be part of a fun indie set experience**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎭 ROLE:**
**Comedy Club Audience Members**
**(all looks/types welcome)**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎬 ABOUT THE FILM**

***Kept Going***** follows Nate, a cocky stand-up comedian who refuses to stop digging himself deeper after making jokes at the expense of the wrong person. What starts as an awkward comedy set spirals into a bizarre survival nightmare deep in the woods involving kidnappers, fake ancestry, family secrets… and a wooden moose.**

**Tone-wise imagine:**

**1.   awkward stand-up comedy**

**2.   wilderness survival chaos**

**3.   psychological humiliation**

**4.   the dumbest possible decisions made with complete confidence**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📍 Filming Location:**
**Colorado Springs, Colorado**

**🕒 Shoot Duration:**
**2 Hours & 30 Minutes**
**(3:30 PM – 6:00 PM)**

**Compensation:**
**Non-paid**
**IMDb Credit + footage + guaranteed visibility on screen**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📩 TO JOIN:**
**Message me directly or email:**
**[jjacks24@uccs.edu](mailto:jjacks24@uccs.edu)**

**Include:**
**• Name**
**• Age**
**• Recent photo/selfie**
**• Availability**

**Come laugh at a man ruining his life in real time.**

items.summary:
**🎬 CASTING CALL — COMEDY CLUB AUDIENCE EXTRAS 🎤**
**for the short film: *****KEPT GOING***
**Written & Directed by **Jordan Jackson

**Ever wanted to be part of a comedy show that goes HORRIBLY wrong?**

**We’re looking for audience extras to fill out a comedy club scene for our upcoming short film *****Kept Going***** — a dark comedy/survival short made as part of a 13-film challenge series.**

**📅 FILMING DATE: MAY 17TH, 2026**

**You’ll be:**

·         **reacting to stand-up comedy**

·         **witnessing a comedian absolutely destroy his own career in real time**

·         **laughing, gasping, judging, cringing, and helping create the chaotic energy of the film**

** **

**AND:**

**1.   You WILL be seen on camera**

**2.   Includes IMDb Credit**

**3.   Great chance to network & be part of a fun indie set experience**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎭 ROLE:**
**Comedy Club Audience Members**
**(all looks/types welcome)**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**🎬 ABOUT THE FILM**

***Kept Going***** follows Nate, a cocky stand-up comedian who refuses to stop digging himself deeper after making jokes at the expense of the wrong person. What starts as an awkward comedy set spirals into a bizarre survival nightmare deep in the woods involving kidnappers, fake ancestry, family secrets… and a wooden moose.**

**Tone-wise imagine:**

**1.   awkward stand-up comedy**

**2.   wilderness survival chaos**

**3.   psychological humiliation**

**4.   the dumbest possible decisions made with complete confidence**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📍 Filming Location:**
**Colorado Springs, Colorado**

**🕒 Shoot Duration:**
**2 Hours & 30 Minutes**
**(3:30 PM – 6:00 PM)**

**Compensation:**
**Non-paid**
**IMDb Credit + footage + guaranteed visibility on screen**

**━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━**

**📩 TO JOIN:**
**Message me directly or email:**
**[jjacks24@uccs.edu](mailto:jjacks24@uccs.edu)**

**Include:**
**• Name**
**• Age**
**• Recent photo/selfie**
**• Availability**

**Come laugh at a man ruining his life in real time.**
items.title: **🎬 CASTING CALL — COMEDY CLUB AUDIENCE EXTRAS 🎤**

items.text:
Updated: Need 3 Male Actors for Table Reading
Genre: A coming‑of‑age.

Title: Her Name Was Maria. 

The actors who can read: 2 teenage boys (14-15) and 1 male (late 20-30) are needed.

Date and Time:  May 23, 2026, 10 AM–2 PM (likely done by 1 PM)  

Location: Ross Cherry Creek Branch Library

What I’m offering:

$20 stipend

Snacks of your choice

Fresh kimbap for everyone

If this sounds fun or meaningful to you, please comment or message me. I’d love to work with you.

topComments.text: I am interested. I have been participating in community theatre since 2014, and have appeared as a background actor in several local movies still in production.

Submission Deadline extended!!
Specifically looking for more submissions for:

WREN: Gender Non-Conforming Gen Z actors 

JYN: BIPOC Women ages 40-49  (but welcome all ethnicities)

Submit to QuantumEntanglementcasting@gmail.com by May 15.

In-Person callbacks have been rescheduled to June 8 and June 10. 

Shooting window July 25-29 in Denver.

items.text:
Hallo liebe Leute!

Wir suchen Sänger/Sängerinnen (mit Humor) für ein deutschssprachiges Studio- Projekt.

Es wäre super , wenn ihr (für den Anfang)  eine eigene Aufnahmemöglichkeit hättet, da es für die meisten hier ja wohl ersteinmal zu weit weg wäre. (Wir kommen aus Hamburg/Hannover)

Bei Interesse einfach melden....Dann können wir alles genau besprechen!

Songbeispiele findet ihr hier auf meinem Kanal.

Beste Grüße

Eric
